programme.desc: Documentary following the work of Steve Irwins family at Australia Zoo. Robert takes on the challenge of relocating Bosco, the zoos most aggressive crocodile. Terri helps Harley the koala find love after a tough breeding season

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Jackson Galaxy travels to Portland to help Lee and Teresa, who called 911 when their cat Lux clawed their son Jesse, after he pulled on the felines tail

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Game Wardens patrol the Rio Grande seeking an unidentified body, whilst Warden Powell explores an unusual deer case. And, a nuisance alligator is relocated

programme.desc: An Eskimo dog arrives with a broken jaw, and Dr Jeff must uncover the cause. He and Dr Nichols also have their hands full treating some uncooperative yaks

programme.desc: Its the middle of summer and the reptiles at Australia Zoo are active and hungry, especially the 44 alligators who inhabit an entire lagoon. Robert has the job of feeding them all at once

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: When a drunken man wreaks havoc on a lake, the wardens must deal with the aftermath. Warden Mike Boone tracks down the culprits responsible for an illegal dumpsite

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: A dog with a shattered leg and seven bad-tempered chickens arrive at the clinic. The team unites when a tiny kitten is found unconscious at a construction site

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr Nichols treats a cat injured in a fight with the dog next door, while a class of fourth-graders counts on Dr Jeff to save its pet hedgehog

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.sub-title: Home Is Where the Dog Is
programme.desc: One of Earls favourite senior dogs has a chance at finding a forever home. Tia heads to a shelter in Louisiana to help with a hound they have taken in

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: Tania and Maria create a retirement centre for senior dogs at one of the warehouses. Lizzy rescues a dog whose skin is in an awful condition

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Jackson helps a couple who have been dating for seven years but are at risk of breaking up because their is a third person in their relationship - Steevs cat Darkness

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Jackson Galaxy helps Orange County housewife Peggy, whose cats behaviour is getting out of hand

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.sub-title: A Treehouse Fit for a Viking
programme.desc: Pete takes on his first international build in Norway. Working with local builder, Frode, the 24 ft high retreat gives stunning views of a nearby lake

programme.title: Meet the Superbrains
programme.desc: The series celebrating pioneering research scientists concludes with a look at the work being done by engineers seeking to revolutionise global transport

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: New science and demonstrations reveal how cats can detect an earthquake seconds before it happens. Plus, how sea otters manage to keep warm in icy waters

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: More fun facts about the animal kingdom, including why some creatures live so long, the reason that cats purr and why elephants have trunks

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Forrest Galante scours lakes and rivers of both metropolitan and rural Vietnam in search of one of the last living specimens of the giant softshell turtle

programme.desc: The Kilchers expand a road with the help of a detonation expert. Meanwhile, Atz Sr and Bonnie embark work together to salvage vital resources

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Jane and Charlotte protect their herd from bears, three generations of the Kilcher family build a shack on Perl Island, and Otto has a surprise for Charlotte

programme.title: Fish or Die
programme.desc: The anglers travel to Australia in search of barramundi, a fish that is almost impossible to find in the wild - until their Aboriginal guides take them to a barra paradise

programme.title: My Garden of a Thousand Bees
programme.desc: The work of Bristol wildlife film-maker Martin Dohrn, who during the Covid-19 pandemic set out to record all the bees he could find in his tiny urban garden. Filming more than 60 different species, from Britains largest bumblebees to scissor bees, the size of a mosquito, Dohrn observes how differences in behaviour set different species apart - and eventually he gets so close he can identify individuals just by looking at them

programme.title: Fred Dibnahs Magnificent Monuments
programme.desc: The steeplejack tours unusual places of worship, beginning in Preston with one of Britains tallest spires, and a Saxon church in Durham made from the remains of an abandoned Roman fort. He also visits St Pauls Cathedral and meets stonemasons involved in the restoration of York Minster

programme.title: Wainwright Walks: Coast to Coast
programme.desc: Julia Bradbury sets off on the last leg of her journey at the highest and most remote overnight spot of the whole walk. Her end goal is Robin Hoods Bay, but first she must cross the North York Moors, walking through Eskdale and on to the woods of Littlebeck before reaching the cliffs at her final destination, where she reflects on the adventure and the legacy of Alfred Wainwright

programme.title: A Timewatch Guide
programme.desc: Series examining how the BBC has revealed and interpreted moments in history, as well as looking at changes in research covered in documentary television. In the first edition, Professor Alice Roberts uses 70 years of BBC history archive to uncover how Stonehenge has been explained, argued over and debated by some of Britains leading historians and archaeologists. She looks at how new theories discredited old ones, how astronomers and geologists became involved, and why, even after centuries of study, there is still no definitive answer to the mystery of Stonehenge

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gail Porter presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on June 25, 1999. Featuring S Club 7, Jamiroquai, NSYNC, Britney Spears, Lit, Adam Rickitt, Melanie G and Vengaboys

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gail Porter presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on July 2, 1999. Featuring Vengaboys, Whitney Houston, The Three Amigos, Suede, A1, Jennifer Lopez and ATB

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Peter Powell hosts, featuring performances by Suzi Quatro, Dan Hill, Elvis Costello, the Vibrators, Kate Bush, Earth, Wind and Fire, Gerry Rafferty and the Manhattan Transfer. Plus, dance group Legs and Co. Originally broadcast on March 16, 1978

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Simon Bates and Peter Powell introduce the edition first aired on March 24, featuring performances by Sinitta, A-ha, Simon Harris, Wet Wet Wet, Debbie Gibson, Climie Fisher, Iron Maiden, Tiffany, Aswad and Whitney Houston

programme.title: Elkie Brooks at the BBC
programme.desc: The singer marks her 80th birthday by looking back over her career, highlighted by some of her finest performances at the BBC, including appearances on Top of the Pops, Parkinson, The Old Grey Whistle Test, Wogan and The One Show. Songs include Pearls a Singer, No More the Fool, Lilac Wine and Fool If You Think Its Over, and in between, Elkie remembers working alongside the likes of Chris Rea and Robert Palmer, and reveals personal insights into what has inspired her

programme.title: Elkie Brooks: Sight and Sound in Concert
programme.desc: Annie Nightingale introduces Elkie Brooks at the Hippodrome, Golders Green in 1977. The concert was originally broadcast as part of the BBC Sight and Sound in Concert series, in which music shows were broadcast simultaneously on TV and radio, allowing viewers to enjoy better sound from their hi-fi speakers

programme.title: Elkie Brooks in Concert
programme.desc: The singer performs in this two-part TV special recorded at the Birmingham NEC, producing a subtle blend of rock numbers and gentle ballads. Hits include Fool if You Think its Over and Pearls a Singer. First broadcast August 19 1987

programme.title: Elkie Brooks in Concert
programme.desc: In the second part of this TV concert recorded at Birmingham NEC, the singer performs hits including Lilac Wine, Dont Cry Out Loud and Gasoline Alley. First broadcast August 21 1987

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gail Porter presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on June 25, 1999. Featuring S Club 7, Jamiroquai, NSYNC, Britney Spears, Lit, Adam Rickitt, Melanie G and Vengaboys

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gail Porter presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on July 2, 1999. Featuring Vengaboys, Whitney Houston, The Three Amigos, Suede, A1, Jennifer Lopez and ATB

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Peter Powell hosts, featuring performances by Suzi Quatro, Dan Hill, Elvis Costello, the Vibrators, Kate Bush, Earth, Wind and Fire, Gerry Rafferty and the Manhattan Transfer. Plus, dance group Legs and Co. Originally broadcast on March 16, 1978

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Simon Bates and Peter Powell introduce the edition first aired on March 24, featuring performances by Sinitta, A-ha, Simon Harris, Wet Wet Wet, Debbie Gibson, Climie Fisher, Iron Maiden, Tiffany, Aswad and Whitney Houston

programme.title: Elkie Brooks: Sight and Sound in Concert
programme.desc: Annie Nightingale introduces Elkie Brooks at the Hippodrome, Golders Green in 1977. The concert was originally broadcast as part of the BBC Sight and Sound in Concert series, in which music shows were broadcast simultaneously on TV and radio, allowing viewers to enjoy better sound from their hi-fi speakers

programme.title: The Good Old Days
programme.desc: Leonard Sachs hosts a 1976 edition of the old-time music hall programme, with Roy Castle, Eartha Kitt, Barry Kent, Hinge and Bracket, the Halfwits and members of the Players Theatre, London among those entertaining an audience at the Leeds City Varieties

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: An arsonist terrorises a housing estate, and Hetty goes undercover in a quilt-making circle in her search for the culprit, while Robert is confined at home with a broken collarbone and has to content himself with Polaroid shots of his burgeoning runner bean crop

programme.title: Angela Rippon: Portrait
programme.desc: Paul Wyeth paints a portrait of the newsreader and broadcaster. First broadcast in1979

programme.title: Hidden Assets
programme.desc: When investigative reporter Olatz Alzola and her family are murdered in Bilbao, DS Claire Wallace is drawn into a case that links their killings to a Criminal Assets Bureau raid in Dublin. Return of the crime drama, starring Nora-Jane Noone. In English and Spanish

programme.title: Hidden Assets
programme.desc: Claire questions Alice, who reacts angrily, while Jon and Claire identify Adama and visit his student residence, only to find it trashed by ONeill. CAB detective Liam Boylan uncovers CCTV footage of a man arguing with Nick, and forensic accountant Norah Dillon discovers he was funnelling money into a Liechtenstein account. Claire and Jon focus on Adamas PhD supervisor Itziar Romero - unaware ONeill is targeting her too. In English and Spanish

programme.title: Parkinson
programme.sub-title: Gillian Anderson, Paul OGrady and Madness
programme.desc: The king of chat meets X Files star Gillian Anderson to discuss her life and career. Plus, interviews with comedians Paul Whitehouse and Paul OGrady - better known at the time as alter ego Lily Savage - and music by Eighties chart-toppers Madness, who perform classic hits It Must Be Love and Our House. From 2002

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth attends the christening of Daisys granddaughter, and is displeased to learn the childs parents are not married. With some encouragement from Richard, she agrees to keep an open mind, but is later irked when the mother and child go missing. Comedy, starring Patricia Routledge and Clive Swift

programme.title: Sorry!
programme.desc: Timothy decides to leave home, but his mother is outraged when she learns of his decision to share a flat with two young women

programme.title: Elaine Paige: 60 Years on Stage
programme.desc: The musical theatre star chats to Zoe Ball about her career, sharing anecdotes and insights from major West End and Broadway productions she has appeared in, including Hair, Evita, Cats, Chess, Piaf, Anything Goes, Sunset Boulevard and Follies. As well as stories about meeting royalty, working with Queen and Stephen Sondheim, and the instant fame that winning the much-coveted role of Eva Peron brought her, there are clips of some of the sensational show tunes she made famous

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: An arsonist terrorises a housing estate, and Hetty goes undercover in a quilt-making circle in her search for the culprit, while Robert is confined at home with a broken collarbone and has to content himself with Polaroid shots of his burgeoning runner bean crop

programme.title: Angela Rippon: Portrait
programme.desc: Paul Wyeth paints a portrait of the newsreader and broadcaster. First broadcast in1979

programme.title: Imagine
programme.sub-title: Rose Wylie: This Rose Is Blooming
programme.desc: Alan Yentob meets the painter, known for her exuberant, large-scale canvases that have been exhibited and sold all over the world. He discovers how her memories and experiences - including her childhood in the Blitz during the Second World War, have helped mould her into the artist she is today, and how she transforms the stuff of everyday experience into new and hitherto unseen painterly visions

programme.title: Newscast
programme.desc: A panel of BBC journalists hosts a weekly round-up from Westminster, delivering the usual mix of serious analysis and light-hearted gossip about the biggest stories in politics

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Weekday magazine show featuring a mixture of topical discussion and expert advice for viewers

programme.title: Crimewatch Caught
programme.desc: How criminals making millions selling counterfeit cigarettes were caught hiding their stash in secret drawers. Plus, a drugs courier who claimed to have won £200,000 gambling. Narrated by Rav Wilding

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers in Birkenhead in Merseyside, and Ilkeston in Derbyshire, both manage to create additional bedrooms in their properties by rejigging existing layouts. A bungalow in Orpington, south-east London, is also appraised. Presented by Jacqui Joseph, Martin Roberts and Dion Dublin

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion presents from Shepton Mallet, Somerset as Raj Bisram and Thomas Forrester help two teams find profitable antiques to sell at auction. Friends and neighbours Pat and Linda, lead by Raj Bisram, have sparkly items on their shopping list but are taken by a flamingo-headed walking cane. Sisters Jess and Jo, guided by Thomas Forrester, are looking for something that jumps out at them from the get-go

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Father tries to find Bishop-Elect Fox who, after taking revenge on Father Brown, has been kidnapped before his consecration

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Wanting to be close to the coast, a couple from Birmingham decide that Cornwall is the perfect destination for their escape. Sonali Shah is on hand to make their dream come true. She also visits a company creating habitats for solitary bees that can also be used in the construction of homes for humans too

programme.title: The Repair Shop on the Road
programme.desc: The team is in Clackmannanshire hoping to revive Alloa Co-op Bowling Clubs faded and warped sign in their centenary year. Meanwhile, Dom Chinea delivers a 19th-century regulator clock from the Hebrides with a ghostly connection, and Will Kirk heads north to Rothes in Moray to learn the craft behind forging traditional copper stills for the multibillion-dollar whisky industry

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene host the quiz in which Sammie, Robert, Caz, Laura and Ivor race in moving podiums across the studio floor to try to win £5,000. The contenders battle across a series of fast-paced qualifiers and head-to-head races where the aim of the game is simple - to make it to the finish line before their rivals. The winner then races against the track itself in an attempt to win the cash prize

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Rose Matafeo joins Alexander Armstrong for the quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers

programme.title: Party Political Broadcast

programme.title: The One Show

programme.sub-title: I Tackled a Terrorist With a Narwhal Tusk
programme.desc: Sculptor Nick attempts to create a piece honouring civil servant Darryn, who fought off a knife-wielding terrorist with a narwhal tusk in London in 2019. Bill Bailey believes Nick is the perfect artist to make a sculpture that honours both the hero and the human behind the headlines

programme.title: Beyond Paradise

The Lily Bond is caught adrift leaving Humphrey and Martha back home with Anne. Crime drama, starring Kris Marshall

programme.desc: The body of Giles, an eccentric monster hunter, is recovered from the sea. He bears injuries oddly suggestive of the legendary creature hes spent years chasing - the Lusca. Mervins life is turned upside down by an unexpected visit from his niece Eloise

programme.desc: A round-up of todays headlines

City claimed an impressive 3-0 win in Novembers reverse fixture and they have led the way at the top of the table for much of the campaign, but United will not have given up hope of winning the title themselves and a victory today would enhance their chances of catching their neighbours

programme.title: The Mask (1994)
programme.desc: A timid bank clerk stumbles on an ancient mask, which endows whoever wears it with untold superhuman powers, unbridled self-confidence and an irresistible charm for the ladies. Unfortunately, he earns the enmity of a local gangster for daring to flirt with his girlfriend - and when the crook gets wind of the artefacts existence, he covets the power for himself. Fantasy comedy, with Jim Carrey, Cameron Diaz, Peter Riegert and Peter Greene

Thriller, starring Blake Lively and Oscar Jaenada

programme.title: Funboys
programme.desc: Gemma and Lorcan throw a party, but Gemma finds one of her old personality quirks coming to the fore again as she struggles to maintain her identity amidst the intoxicating brew of Lorcans old-fashioned country charm. Callum makes a new friend in Gemmas brother David, but finds theres a catch. Comedy, with Rian Lennon, Ryan Dylan and Ele McKenzie

programme.title: Boarders
programme.desc: Femi is feeling the pressure as he tries to make a good impression with Cheddars dad, who gives him a daring proposal - but Pixie proves very distracting. Tobys mum tells Abby an uncomfortable truth, while Leah and Felix get trapped in the dinner from hell. Omar avoids romance, while Leah is surprised to find some

programme.title: Boarders
programme.desc: Its the day of the election, and Femi prepares to take on Cheddar. With a lot riding on his success, Femi recruits the help of a reluctant Toby, who is dealing with his own crisis. Omar has a daring plan, while Leah is pulled away from Benjamin by a struggling Felix

programme.title: The Trials of Pa Salieu
programme.desc: Documentary following the British-Gambian musician as he attempts to rebuild his life and career after prison, returning to live performance while still on probation, navigating curfews, travel restrictions and the risk of recall. He makes his comeback at the Glastonbury Festival, but touring in Europe hangs in the balance, and he faces a choice between breaking commitments and risking a return to prison

programme.title: P Diddy: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: Yinka Bokinni investigates how Sean Combs has gone from being the worlds biggest hip-hop mogul to haemorrhaging money, businesses, friends and fans in a matter of months. Yinka will examine how Combs made it to the top, and what some may have turned a blind eye to along the way. Speaking to some of Combs inner circle, and biggest critics, Yinka will find out what they think about him and ask why so many are only speaking out now

programme.title: Press X to Continue
programme.desc: The BBCs gaming reporter Steffan Powell is joined by a host of special guests to consider forgotten franchises, discussing which titles they wish would make a return

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall is spat at and bitten by several creatures as he takes a look at venom

programme.desc: Lawyer Mr Mustela approaches Gomez and Morticia for a sample of their daughter Wednesdays DNA. The advocate claims the enfant terrible was switched in the maternity ward with another child, leaving Gomez devastated at the prospect of losing his little girl. Animated family comedy, with the voices of Oscar Isaac and Charlize Theron and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: Divergent (2014)
programme.desc: A teenager grows up in a strictly ordered future society where peoples lives are decided according to personality types. She discovers she does not fit into any of the existing categories, and must fight against a conspiracy to wipe out all those like her. Sci-fi adventure based on the book series by Veronica Roth, starring Shailene Woodley and Kate Winslet

programme.title: Divergent: Insurgent (2015)
programme.desc: An outsider in a strictly regimented society where peoples lives are determined by personality types faces a new crisis as conflict brews between different factions. Her isolation from the general population may make her the only one who can save her world. Sci-fi adventure sequel based on Veronica Roths novel, starring Shailene Woodley and Kate Winslet

programme.title: Divergent: Allegiant (2016)
programme.desc: Rebels fighting for freedom in a strictly ordered society escapes from the walled city they live in. They find themselves in a strange and dangerous new world, where they face a battle for their own survival and of those they have left behind. Third in the sci-fi adventure series based on Veronica Roths novels, starring Shailene Woodley, Theo James and Naomi Watts

programme.title: My Mates a Bad Date
programme.desc: Twenty-one-year-old Khalil from Nottingham cannot get a second date. Oloni thinks that remembering his dates names, dropping the baby girl tag and cooling off on the bragging might help his chances

programme.title: The Trials of Pa Salieu
programme.desc: Documentary following the British-Gambian musician as he attempts to rebuild his life and career after prison, returning to live performance while still on probation, navigating curfews, travel restrictions and the risk of recall. He makes his comeback at the Glastonbury Festival, but touring in Europe hangs in the balance, and he faces a choice between breaking commitments and risking a return to prison

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Clara and the Doctor arrive at a haunted mansion in the 1970s, where a gifted psychic and a professor are searching for a spirit who is said to have appeared in the building over the years. But the so-called Witch of the Well soon turns out to be more than your average ghost. Jessica Raine and Dougray Scott guest star

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.sub-title: Journey to the Centre of the Tardis
programme.desc: The Tardis is captured by a spaceship salvage team, sending its systems into meltdown. The Doctor realises Clara is still trapped within his malfunctioning ship, so he persuades the motley crew to help find her, taking them deep into the heart of his beloved blue box. But monsters from the future have been unleashed and they only have 30 minutes before the Tardis self-destructs. Ashley Walters guest stars

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison and Mike discover their neighbour has been scheming behind their backs - his outlandish tactics threatening the success of their guesthouse business. For Alison, this warrants all out war and she sets about playing him at his own game. If she is going to stoop to such trickery however, shell need the help of one of the ghosts. Mike attempts to mix things up for future guests at the gatehouse by secretly investing in some not-so-cheap entertainment that Alison will definitely not approve of. Meanwhile, the Captain makes a discovery, leading the other ghosts to find a surprising new friend

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison and Mike receive some exciting news about their guesthouse business, but the fallout soon sees tensions running high between the pair. Pat and Thomas learn about the challenges of veganism, Kitty attempts to adopt a new way of communicating that sparks confusion between her and Alison. Lady Button is delighted by a new arrival that allows her to tap into a past passion. Robin however is less charmed by the new addition. Julian is confronted by a hard truth, but is determined to prove everyone wrong. Alison and Mike reach boiling point as Robin comes face to face with his biggest fear

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Agnes is feeling down in the dumps. The house is a mess, she cant seem to get any sleep and - to make things worse - Marias home remedies end in disaster. Will the family show her some much-needed and long overdue appreciation? Cmedy, starring Brendan OCarroll

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Agnes decides to try out speed-dating at Foleys, while a promotional scheme by Buster and Dermot backfires for the salon. Later, the arrival of a new neighbour puts Agnes and Winnies friendship to the test. Comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll, with Danny OCarroll, Paddy Houlihan and Eilish OCarroll

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Friendship, loyalty, laughter and lots of mischief bring Cork inner-city teenagers and best friends Conor and Jock into conflict with their headmaster - leaving Conors mother to pick up the pieces. To add fuel to the fire, the lads strike up friendships with the headmasters daughters. First episode of the comedy, starring Alex Murphy and Chris Walley

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Conor and Jocks friendships with Principal Walshs daughters intensify, causing awkward tension between the lads, the principal, and Linda and Siobhan themselves. Mrs Walsh is intent on her husband giving the lads a chance, but despite everyones best intentions, things get out of hand when the duo crash a Walsh family barbecue. Comedy, starring Alex Murphy and Chris Walley

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: After the disastrous encounter at the Walsh family barbecue, Conor and Jock reason that there is only one option left to get Linda and Siobhan to really fall for them - spend a whole day together on a beautiful adventure. Maireads plan to invite a friend over for dinner doesnt go down well with Conor. Comedy, starring Alex Murphy and Chris Walley

programme.title: Long Story Short
programme.desc: Desperate to impress his crush, awkward fresher Rohan turns to an online masculinity coach for advice, but begins to question if alpha status is all its cracked up to be

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Conor and Maireads much-loved fridge finally gives up on them. Remembering the item was originally bought in a town many miles away, Mairead decides that a family trip to that same place to buy a replacement will be just the thing to bond with her son. After some discussion Jock is eventually included, bringing along his keen navigation skills and unique sense of entertainment to pass the time. During the journey, all the travellers learn lessons about family connections. Comedy, starring Alex Murphy and Chris Walley

programme.title: Long Story Short
programme.desc: A shy 17-year-old outsider is marked for abduction as part of his new home towns terrifying tradition. He must evade capture and make it through the night, navigating love, friendship and events that are beyond explanation

programme.title: Long Story Short
programme.desc: A woman who has known she has a double since she was a 10 vows to confront her, and take back control of her life after a decade of intense and bitter rivalry

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Money is getting increasingly tight in the McSweeney household, prompting Conor and Jock to come up with inventive and unsatisfying ways of making food last longer. Determined to help Mairead financially, the lads think about ways they can come up with some extra cash, eventually arriving at an ill-advised plan. Meanwhile, Mairead and Sergeant Healy are in two minds about taking their friendship to the next level. Comedy, starring Alex Murphy and Chris Walley

programme.title: Long Story Short
programme.desc: An aspiring comedian must choose between sanitising his set and embracing his voice after a controversial performance results in further gigs being cancelled

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Conor and Jock make a plan to take a bus journey but not before Jock, posing as Fake Billy, swipes some alcopops from an off-licence and is unsuccessfully pursued by a security guard. Local bully Billy Murphy stumbles upon this chase, and follows his impersonator onto a bus which he proceeds to accidentally commandeer. Pursued by police, the wild ride ironically brings Conor, Jock and the girls closer together - along with the other innocent passengers. Comedy, starring Alex Murphy and Chris Walley

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Fortitude star Robert Sheehan appears as himself in this festive episode of the sitcom. The residents of the council estate where Conor and Jock live are threatened with eviction, but are not about to go down without a fight - and the resulting media circus puts everyone on edge. In the midst of all this mayhem, Conors mother Mairead is rushed to hospital, and may be more seriously ill than previously thought. When she says she wants to see a white Christmas, the lads vow to make her wish come true - with a little help from Sheehan, who is shooting a film nearby

programme.title: The Trials of Pa Salieu
programme.desc: Documentary following the British-Gambian musician as he attempts to rebuild his life and career after prison, returning to live performance while still on probation, navigating curfews, travel restrictions and the risk of recall. He makes his comeback at the Glastonbury Festival, but touring in Europe hangs in the balance, and he faces a choice between breaking commitments and risking a return to prison

programme.title: Licorice Pizza (2021)
programme.desc: In the San Fernando Valley in 1973, 25-year-old Alana Kane is going through the motions as a photographers assistant when 15-year-old child star Gary Valentine makes romantic overtures toward her. Despite the age gap, she agrees to go to dinner with him. Paul Thomas Andersons romantic comedy, starring Alana Haim, Cooper Hoffman, Sean Penn, Tom Waits and Bradley Cooper

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: North East England and Yorkshire: Main and Dessert
programme.desc: The remaining three chefs from north east England and Yorkshire compete over mains and desserts inspired by the British film industry. The dishes are judged by veteran judge Paul Ainswort, which include a creation using duck, fresh fig and king oyster mushrooms to show what the kestrel in the classic film Kes might see whilst flying over the moors

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: In the wake of a family tragedy, the Bennet household is thrown into disarray. Mary faces an uncertain future, until her aunt and uncle offer her the chance of a fresh start. At first, Mary struggles to adjust to her new life, but she begins to realise that she can have a life away from the watchful eye of her mother

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: The Repair Shop on the Road
programme.desc: Will Kirk heads to Bletchley Park, Buckinghamshire, where he helps revive a historic Hollerith card-punching machine that powered Second World War code breaking. Back at the barn, Richard Talman restores a cherished floral brooch

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Jacqui Joseph is not impressed by the mushrooms growing inside a Norfolk end-of-terrace, while Dion Dublin thinks walls need to be rebuilt in a West Midlands property. Martel Maxwell meets a foster father and son who have teamed up to become developers

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Bradley and Barney Walsh host the last semi-final. Four contenders must face five brutal events before going head to head in the legendary Eliminator for a place in next weeks final. Steel has a score to settle in Hang Tough, Viper charges into Suspension Bridge, and Fire enjoys an epic fight with a firefighter

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: The current set of players faces its final day competing for the chance to win £10,000 before 24 new faces arrive. Game show, hosted by Rick Edwards

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: Eight players do battle in the knockout quiz. Only one will be left standing at the end, hoping to reach the Golden Run and double their money. Hosted by Alex Scott

programme.title: Chess Masters: The Endgame
programme.desc: Sue Perkins presents as the four finalists compete for the trophy, facing a challenge to demonstrate how well they can find the checkmate, before the hopefuls are whittled down in a daunting simultaneous match against grandmaster David Howell. The remaining two then step up to the board for the final eliminator, each hoping they can use all the skills they have learnt to make them series champion

programme.title: Clive Myries Italian Road Trip
programme.desc: Clive has visited Rome before, but this time heads out of the centre and up one of the citys seven hills to the rarely visited neighbourhood of Monteverde, where he talks football with a butcher and puts his Caribbean cooking knowledge to good use. He also tries his hand at Italys fastest growing sport, stays in the citys most unusual hotel and has a go at an ancient Roman art form

programme.title: Big Little Journeys
programme.desc: In Taiwan, a Formosan pangolin travels through a land of giants in a protected forest and must prove himself worthy of a mate. In Brazils Atlantic forest, golden-headed lion tamarins travel to the edge of their world and find a strange land of plenty. Will the family find a new home where they can live peacefully alongside humans?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Part two of two. The team returns to Cliveden in Buckinghamshire, where items that came under scrutiny include a delicate satinwood bureau brought in by a descendant of artist Joshua Reynolds, a silver cruet set, and a collection of illustrated letters from India described as the pop art of the 1850s. Presented by Michael Aspel

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and Tracy Martin value items at Oxford Universitys Sheldon Theatre, including a Rolex watch and an unwanted inkwell. Paul Martin hears the story behind a book that took 70 years to complete - the Oxford English Dictionary

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Former winners Amy Gledhill, Jacqui Joseph, Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen and Tim Vine test their general knowledge skills on double points Friday, when the days champion, and the weeks victor is revealed

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories
programme.desc: The chef celebrates British food, examining the stories behind the nations best-loved dishes and meeting people involved in providing the ingredients for them, He begins in the Lake District, enjoying a traditional mutton hotpot with sheep farmer and author James Rebank, then braves Morecambe Bays treacherous mud flats to meet a shrimp fisherman. Back home in Padstow, Rick is joined by his son Jack to cook his mums shepherds pie

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: North East England and Yorkshire: Judging
programme.desc: Its judging day, and only one chef can go through to represent north east England and Yorkshire. Judges Tom Kerridge, Lorna McNee, and Phil Wang are joined by screenwriter and author Frank Cottrell-Boyce, who helps decide the winner from the two remaining chefs. Andi Oliver hosts

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: Monty Don is busy with spring and planning ahead for summer. Hes doing a seed-sowing masterclass, cutting back Cornus and dividing ferns to put in the new Woodland Garden. Frances Tophill is exploring the tiny but expansive world of miniature daffodils at a nursery with hundreds of cultivars. And in Llanelli, Sue Kent meets a gardener who has set up her own seed library, helping to preserve varieties of flowers and edibles which flourish in local Welsh soil and beyond

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: Reunited to protect themselves from intruding male lions, the Xudum pride mothers now struggle to feed so many mouths. Tsebe has four cubs, and her smallest is close to starving. When he becomes injured and then lost, his life is on a knife edge

programme.title: Greatest Gardens
programme.desc: Garden experts Diarmuid Gavin and Carol Klein are joined by guest judge Dame Prue Leith to visit three gardens. In Ballynahinch, Tomas and Thomass three and a half acre Fernhill Garden is filled with more than 4000 plants, and Karen has a suburban garden in Jordanstown. Near Crumlin, County Antrim, Will has a six acre farmhouse garden, Holly House, which he has planted over the last 27 years

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Insights and global interviews on the crucial news stories of the day with Matt Chorley

programme.desc: Jules is targeted in a horrific homophobic attack, so when he encounters one of his attackers in a sauna some time later, he wants revenge. Thriller, starring Nathan Stewart-Jarrett, Aaron Heffernan, George MacKay and Nima Taleghani

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: Colletta Smith investigates the rising cost-of-living impact for communities as rising prices, wages and higher taxes push businesses and families to the brink. Prime Minister Keir Starmer said that 2026 would be the year that more people would begin to feel positive change, but independent experts say we may have to wait a little longer before we notice a few extra pounds in our pockets

Frances Tophill is exploring the tiny but expansive world of miniature daffodils at a nursery with hundreds of cultivars. And in Llanelli, Sue Kent meets a gardener who has set up her own seed library, helping to preserve varieties of flowers and edibles which flourish in local Welsh soil and beyond

programme.title: All About Eve (1950)
programme.desc: An ageing stage star is flattered by the attention of an adoring fan, and decides to take the young woman under her wing as her personal assistant - unaware that her new protegee is really a ruthlessly ambitious, budding actor who will do all that it takes to steal the limelight. Oscar-winning drama, starring Bette Davis, Anne Baxter, George Sanders, Thelma Ritter, Marilyn Monroe and Celeste Holm

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: North East England and Yorkshire: Starter and Fish
programme.desc: Four chefs compete for north east England and Yorkshire with blockbuster canapes, starters and fish dishes celebrating the British film industry. The judge is chef and long-time friend of the competition Paul Ainsworth. Dishes include a pearl barley dal with a Gladiator theme and a black-and-white monkfish that celebrates Newcastle film noir

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton helps a couple find a new home in Dorset and meets a pair who have diversified their family farm and now run a hospitality business with luxury shepherds huts

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: The team visits Folkestone, Kent, where experts Mark Stacey and Nick Hall offer advice on antiques brought to the valuation day, and Paul Martin investigates the work of Victorian architect Augustus Pugin at the house he built in nearby Ramsgate

programme.title: The Ipcress File (1965)
programme.desc: An intelligence agent investigating the kidnap and brainwashing of Britains most renowned scientists unpicks a complex chain of connections and high-level intrigue, while detecting evidence of double-dealing and counter-espionage. Spy thriller based on Len Deightons novel, starring Michael Caine, Sue Lloyd, Gordon Jackson and Nigel Green.

programme.title: Earths Great Rivers
programme.desc: A journey along the American river, whose fingers stretch into nearly half of the USA, collecting water from 31 states. The documentary follows the Mississippi through varied landscapes from its source to its mouth, starting in the towering Rocky Mountains of Wyoming and Montana, where billions of tons of water, ultimately destined to flow south are trapped as ice and snow

programme.title: Super League Live
programme.desc: Leigh Leopards v Toulouse Olympique (Kick-off 5.30pm). All the action from the match at Progress with Unity Stadium. The Leopards performed well last term, reaching the semi-finals, but struggled for form in the early stages of the current season. This is Toulouses maiden Super League campaign and they have acquitted themselves well so far

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The friendship of reality TVs Chris Hughes and Jake Quickenden is put to the test as they explore South Yorkshires antique shops with Izzie Balmer and Irita Marriott. A 19th-century milk jug attracts Chriss eye, while an unusual four-spouted teapot gets Jake excited

programme.title: Inside Britains National Parks
programme.desc: Documentary looking at four of Britains 15 national parks, capturing the sights and sounds of these unique places and meeting the people who live and work there. The opening edition visits the New Forest, once a royal hunting ground for William the Conqueror and now a mosaic of open heathlands, ancient woodlands, coastline and picturesque villages. The park is home to ponies, deer, rare bird species and reptiles, while the traditional grazing practices of generations of commoners sustain this landscape, with their ponies and pigs roaming freely throughout the park

programme.title: Show Tunes at the BBC: Volume 3
programme.desc: Elaine Paige guides viewers through another treasure trove of musical theatre moments from the BBC archives. With classic numbers from Hello, Dolly! to Les Miserables, Chess to South Pacific, the programme features memorable performances from artists including Shirley Bassey, Michael Buble, Fred Astaire, Alison Moyet, Louis Armstrong and Elaine herself

programme.title: Show Tunes at the BBC: Volume 2
programme.desc: As The Big Night of Musicals ends on BBC One, Elaine Paige keeps the show running by rustling up a fresh selection of tunes from favourite musicals, including Les Miserables, Oklahoma!, Hamilton and Joseph and the Amazing Technicolor Dreamcoat. The performances, all taken from the BBC archive, feature the likes of Shirley Bassey, Alfie Boe, Hugh Jackman and Barbara Dickson, as well as a set of full cast ensembles

programme.title: Barra on the Foyle
programme.desc: Barra Best makes a journey across the river network, meeting people who work, live and play along its banks,and exploring places and landscapes rarely seen on TV screens

programme.title: Good Vibrations (2012)
programme.desc: A music lover in 1970s Belfast opens a record shop while his city is torn apart by the Troubles. His business introduces him to the citys underground punk scene, and he becomes one of the key figures in creating an alternative subculture to the violence around him. Fact-based drama, starring Richard Dormer, Jodie Whittaker, Liam Cunningham and Dylan Moran

programme.title: Show Tunes at the BBC
programme.desc: Elaine Paige guides viewers through a selection of songs from musicals from the BBC archives, including numbers from Cats, The Lion King, Funny Girl, My Fair Lady, Sunset Boulevard, West Side Story, A Little Night Music and The Sound of Music

programme.title: Sings Musicals
programme.desc: Memorable versions of songs taken from or inspired by musicals. The programme features Ella Fitzgerald singing Mack the Knife, from The Threepenny Opera, Captain Sensibles 1982 chart-topper Happy Talk, a cover of a song from South Pacific, and performances by Jeff Beck and Jay-Z

programme.title: Curse of Skinwalker Ranch
programme.desc: The team ignites a massive bonfire to investigate the Bubble. However, what appears in the smoke proves to be more chilling than anyone expected

programme.title: In Search of Aliens
programme.desc: Giorgio Tsoukalos investigates whether aliens lie at the heart of Earths most famous mysteries. In this instalment, he looks at the new clues narrowing down the possible location of Atlantis, suggesting that Platos mysterious island was the home of an advanced civilisation

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: A countdown of the top 10 alien petroglyphs around the world, from strange figures to flying craft and carvings of what appear to be astronauts

programme.title: Historys Greatest Mysteries

programme.desc: Adolf Hitler began gradually changing a peaceful German people into a merciless war machine after capturing power in 1933. Now, specialists study the inventive tactics employed by the Nazis to indoctrinate and control the will of its citizens. Narrated by Jamie Theakston

programme.desc: Documentary drawing on archaeological excavations, expert commentary, 3D animation and historical reconstructions to delve into the mysteries, myths and arcane history of the Celts. The first of three programmes explores some of the mysteries of how the early Celts emerged and expanded, from collapsed salt mines, to bizarre rituals and lost cities

programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. Phil, Beckie, Kathy and Af work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Bullseye
programme.desc: Quiz that tests contestants skill at darts and their general knowledge

programme.title: Bullseye
programme.desc: Quiz that tests contestants skill at darts and their general knowledge

programme.title: Bullseye
programme.desc: Quiz that tests contestants skill at darts and their general knowledge

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 65-year-old woman is rushed to Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham after being found collapsed in the park. Domestic cleaner Deanna, a long-serving member of the AandE team, shares her struggles in early life, including overcoming addiction, before finding her purpose working in the hospital. The doctors treat a teenager with a burn on her hand

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: A fallen scrambler with head and neck injuries is precariously lodged at the edge of a waterfall for several hours and moving him threatens further problems. However, with the cold mountain water bringing him close to hypothermia, the team has little choice. On the other side of the Lakes, a local marathon brings its own challenges as temperatures soar towards 30 degrees Celsius

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Brick Hotel in Newtown, Pennsylvania, where the staff have had enough of owner Verindar, who runs the establishment like an angry tyrant. Can Gordon convince her to value her loyal workers and entice customers back to this landmark hotel?

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Day three of the reality contest gets under way, with eight remaining in the battle to win up to £100,000. While one contestant approaches the upcoming hunt with supreme confidence, another decides its time to abandon their role as underdog and come out fighting. Strategies shift and fortunes flip in the forest, and a dramatic twist turns the game on its head, putting even the strongest players in peril ahead of a tense and unexpected climax

programme.title: Land (2021)
programme.desc: Edee, in the aftermath of an unfathomable event, finds herself unable to stay connected to the world she once knew and in the face of that uncertainty, retreats to the magnificent but unforgiving wilds of the Rockies. After a local hunter brings her back from the brink of death, she must find a way to live again. Drama, directed by and starring Robin Wright, with Demián Bichir and Sarah Dawn Pledge

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Vicky and Carl have always planned to move to Spain for their retirement, but now that their children are going to university theyve brought their plans forward deciding that now is the time to find the perfect holiday home on the southern Costa Blanca. With a budget of £70,000, Jean Johansson shows the couple some tempting options - are any of them good enough for them to put in an offer?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In Liverpool, Phil Spencer helps James and his wife Mairead, who are new to the area and want a property on a budget of £600,000, while Kirstie Allsopp assists fledgling house-hunters Andy and Laura, and it soon becomes apparent the couple have quite different expectations about their first home together

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Jon Kay joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A local newscaster requests an interview with Sam, giving him a poignant reminder of how much he misses his former celebrity status. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and John Ratzenberg

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The bar-room regulars are excited at the prospect of meeting Coachs future son-in-law, Roy, until they realise he is a complete lout with no redeeming features. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam upsets Diane by making advances to one of her old college friends who is on the rebound from an unhappy love affair. Starring Ted Danson and George Wendt

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ally babysits the twins, and does such a good job that Debra gives her even more responsibility around the house. However, Marie fears her granddaughter is being treated like a slave

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray worries Debras criticism will make the children think he is a fool, and hatches a plan to win back their respect

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray refuses to take Debra to an awards ceremony, tired of her constant lateness, while Frank and Robert get into their own heated debate about the importance of punctuality. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton, Peter Boyle and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles takes a new position as a magazine art critic, prompting a jealous Frasier to respond by launching his own arts show. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Dog That Rocks the Cradle
programme.desc: Martin returns from a friends funeral upset by how it was conducted, and begins to plan his own memorial. Meanwhile, sacked DJ Bulldog takes the opportunity to embark on an entirely new career - in pizza delivery. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier fall out, each convinced the other is secretly coveting his date. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier are excited to learn they may be descended from Russian royalty, and Martin appears on the Antiques Roadshow. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to New Orleans, Louisiana to help the owner of Blakes Place, a small Creole-Italian restaurant that has lost sight of the most crucial aspect of an eaterys reputation - executing delicious and memorable dishes. The restaurant has spiralled into chaos, and owner Blake Cressey hasnt taken a salary in six months. Blake is starstruck to meet Gordon, but will she take his advice and rediscover what really matters in running a successful business?

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team heads to Sues house in Tiverton, Devon, finding a moped that brings back memories, and fighting over a petrol gauge that Simon OBrien wants to upcycle into a clock

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: The male lambs need to be separated from the females. Molly and Nicola help Janice to bring some freshly laid eggs to the barn, where theyll need to be incubated before hatching into the next generation of rare-breed chickens. The final stages of the hay harvest begin, and Matt surprises his dad Mike with a trip to the restoration garage to see what hes been up to with his 1946 Dodge

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Jon Kay joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A couple who have been visiting Lanzarote twice a year for many years have decided to buy their own holiday home on the island. Jean Johansson shows Nat and Dave what their £180,000 budget can buy, from a Costa Teguise two-bedroom townhouse and a bijou bungalow to a wow-factor place with superb sea views

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In France, newlyweds Jon and Angela figure out the next steps for their French wedding venue. In Bulgaria, Colin and Paul give their holiday let and horseback riding a trial trot. And in Spain, hoteliers Jo and Ken find out if their business-boosting experiments have moved the dial

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Two hosts decide upon an all-guns-blazing approach to payment day, knowing full well that theyve vastly underpaid everyone. With allegations of game playing and dishonest marking flying like bullets in a warzone, its quite the tension-filled affair - and no ones getting out unscathed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final night in the West Country and actor and spiritualist Jos turn to host. Shes hoping that her international menu will impress the group however, some of her opinions have raised eyebrows throughout the week and could threaten her chances. With Jos aim of wowing with her food, its not long before Kirstein takes the chance to get some revenge. Richard offends Peppe by stating his love of pineapple on pizza, sending the Italian into a foodie frenzy. Peppe is shocked to find a picture of Jo from her younger days and likens her to Lady Diana, while Jo reveals her chance encounter with a famous Hollywood star and is also keen to share her spirituality and how shes had several visitations from deceased musicians

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next?
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth heads to Murcia in eastern Spain to meet up with Kate and Wayne, who bought their perfect holiday home in 2022 for £90,000. Now Lees back to see what changes theyve made and finds himself hitting a brick wall, again! Laura Hamilton is back in the Tarn-et-Garonne region of central France to catch up with Keith and his good friend Neil after helping Keith find his perfect place for his £185,000 back in 2021. Now Laura sees what Keith has done to his French fancy

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Political journalist Lewis Goodall assesses the origins of the downfall in popularity of the Labour government, from party infighting to policy U-turns, courting Donald Trump, the Mandelson-Epstein scandal, high-profile ministerial resignations and a by-election battleground. Lewis speaks to MPs, advisors and pollsters, as well as celebrity critics and journalists, and follows the unfolding story as the police make arrests, opposition closes in, and the clamour for information intensifies over what Keir Starmer and his top team knew about Mandelson and Epstein

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the weeks biggest and best shows

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Nabil Abdulrashid and Charlotte Church for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Sarah Millican: Control Enthusiast
programme.desc: A stand-up performance by the comedian, including topics such as road rage, IBS, her favourite word and how she lets her husband know tonights the night. There are also stories about Rescue Men, passing wind in hospital pants, what can happen at a bra fitting and how she feels about her belly

programme.title: Bill Bailey Qualmpeddler
programme.desc: Stand-up comedy from Londons Hammersmith Apollo, targeting everything from the coalition and popular culture to shark-diving. Theres also plenty of light-hearted musical numbers throughout, including religious dubstep, German folk-metal, a Bible-guitar, a Jewish clap-along take on the Match of the Day theme and a reggae version of Downton Abbey, plus the extraordinary tale of a rescued owl

programme.title: Benedetta (2021)
programme.desc: Benedetta Carlini arrives at the Convent of the Mother of God in Pescia, northern Italy as a child. In adulthood, she experiences powerful visions of Jesus, and her proclamations draw crowds to the convent. However, Benedettas faith is tested by the arrival of a young woman called Bartolomea, who arouses forbidden lust. Historical drama, starring Virginie Efira, Charlotte Rampling and Lambert Wilson. In French

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Joe Lycett and comedian Jessica Fostekew head to Lanzarote, known as the island of a thousand volcanoes. The duo hire a trike to discover the lunar landscape and sample volcanic wine in the surreal and surprisingly fertile region of La Geria, before stopping off for a traditional meal of limpets and bienmesabe. They then visit the Jameos del Agua, a partially collapsed lava tube that houses a restaurant, concert hall and crystalline lagoon, home to a tiny blind albino crab found nowhere else in the world. Then its on to Puerto Calero for a submarine safari and a trip to the Jardin de Cactus, which incorporates a cafe serving cactus croquettes

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Charing, Kent, where landlady Natalie Palmer hopes to show that her BandB, The Oak, is better than any of her guests establishments. Everything starts off well when a couple are delighted to have enough room for their yoga mats, but the rest of the party are unimpressed with the extractor fans

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants visit the White Lady in Worstead, Norfolk, on their second night, where proprietor Dennis Gilligan tells his guests about a spooky presence that resides there. The guests get competitive in a round of clay shooting, and debate whether they believe in the existence of ghosts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Cranleigh House BandB in Combe Martin, Devon, where former couple Katherine Armitage and Stewart Johnston offer alternative accommodation for those who enjoy yoga and are seeking spiritual enlightenment. They hope the group will send out energy for world peace and healing, but Mike and Denise question whether the whole thing is a joke

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mike and Denise Mitchell welcome the contestants to Beaches BandB in Paignton, Devon, which only opened for business a few weeks ago. Fellow competitor Katherine puts the owners through their paces at breakfast when she asks for something off the menu, and the hosts are pleasantly surprised at feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners come together for one last time to discover what they have been paid, and the identity of the winner. The Oak owner Natalie wants to know why some of her guests were not enthused by her extractor fans, but she herself receives aggression from Dennis over her criticism of the White Lady. Katherine and Stuart defend their vegetarian breakfast, and Mike and Denise deal with negative comments about their cereal selection

programme.title: Kirsties Fill Your House for Free
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp comes to the rescue of Dave and Kate, whose house has been flooded

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Arthur is admitted to hospital for heart surgery and while leafing through an extensive scrapbook Carrie discovers her fathers hidden secrets. Meanwhile, Doug soon regrets makes friends with a quirky stranger in the wards. Comedy, starring Jerry Stiller and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: When Arthur has a fall, Doug installs a camera in the basement to keep a watchful eye on him - but Deacon, Spence and Danny become addicted to spying on the pensioner. Meanwhile, Carrie decides to buy life insurance, filling her husband with fear for the future. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: A slice of wedding cake triggers off memories of Carries uneasiness prior to her big day and a desperate search for reassurance from God about her marriage to Doug. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra wants to buy an expensive dress for Ally to wear to a friends 13th birthday party, but Ray refuses to spend $250 on something that will only be used once, and naturally Marie takes his side. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Madylin Sweeten

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert contemplates leaving the police force to take up a job selling security systems, but the proposal receives a mixed reaction, leading to tense celebrations at his birthday party. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Brad Garrett and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is delighted to be awarded an honorary doctorate, but hurts Debras feelings by thanking everyone except her in his acceptance speech. He claims it was an accident, though she takes the opportunity to remind him of past snubs that were obviously deliberate

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles tries to settle a score with a plastic surgeon, only to find himself attracted to her, while Frasier is disappointed by the lack of achievements listed in his obituary when it is published prematurely

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frederick does his best to get Frasier and Lilith back together during a Thanksgiving visit. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, Bebe Neuwirth and Trevor Einhorn

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. A bout of crippling back pain prompts Frasier to begin taking strong medication - which dulls his senses and causes him to accidentally blurt out a long-held secret to Daphne. Comedy, with Kelsey Grammer and Jane Leeves

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer enters Lisa in a beauty pageant to boost her self-esteem, and has the satisfaction of seeing her crowned runner-up - but she finds her principles heavily compromised as a result. Featuring the voice of Bob Hope

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart misbehaves once too often, prompting Homer and Marge to impose a terrible punishment - banning him from ever going to see the new feature-length Itchy and Scratchy film, and standing firm despite his constant pleas

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Steve Jones presents action from the battle for grid positions for the third round of the season, held at Suzuka Circuit. With analysis from Billy Monger and Lawrence Baretto

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes a job at the power plant to help with the cost of repairing the family home, which is sliding off its foundations. With the voice of Tom Jones

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart develops a crush on babysitter Laura Powers and plots to break up her relationship with bullying boyfriend Jimbo Jones - but things do not turn out as planned. Featuring the voice of Sara Gilbert (Roseanne, The Big Bang Theory)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at The Peniarth Arms in Bryncrug, where host Susanne Fox is joined by her best friend and colleague Anwen Roberts, but a revelation raises some eyebrows

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Toby Rhys Davies is second to host at Apple Camping in Redberth, Pembrokeshire, where he hopes his unique take on glamping will impress his rivals. The UFO and aeroplane accommodation prove a hit with the guests - but come feedback time, theres just something missing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the Garden House in Blagdon, Somerset, where host and chef Ryan Blackman is hoping his breakfast will wow his guests. But when morning comes around, Susanne and Anwen find their brekkie hard to stomach

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guest house owners head to Ivy House in St Austell, Cornwall, home to James Earl. Susanne and Anwen marvel at the delightful views, but the lack of a lock is a key issue for Ryan and Sarah. At breakfast, Tobys PJs are on the menu but its the sausage thats under scrutiny for Susanne and Anwen

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guest house owners meet one last time to find out what theyve been paid and to settle some scores. Ryan and Sarah seem rather upset over cleanliness concerns and James wants to chew over some tough breakfast feedback. Some strong opinions are aired, and differences debated before the payments are revealed and a winner is announced

programme.title: Togo (2019)
programme.desc: The true story of a dog who led the transportation of diphtheria antitoxin by sled across Alaska in 1925, despite being considered too small and weak to cope with such an intense journey. Adventure based on a true story, starring Willem Dafoe, Julianne Nicholson, Christopher Heyerdahl and Richard Dormer

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Britains Most Luxurious Train Journeys
programme.desc: A guide to luxury train rides across Britain, beginning with the steam-hauled Saphos train on the Devonshire coast. Train manager Sandra and her hospitality team help a passenger surprise his wife of 40 years with a special anniversary present, while executive chef Nick creates a sumptuous five-course meal and learner steam train driver Ian clocks up more training hours passing alongside the red rock coast

programme.title: Chernobyl: 48 Hours To Escape
programme.desc: Documentary following the first 48 hours following the explosion at the nuclear power plant, charting the safety test that led to the disaster, the heroic efforts to prevent a second even worse explosion, and the evacuation of 50,000 people from the nearby city of Pripyat. Featuring contributions from first-hand witnesses, including the chief operator and medical personnel, historians and professors of radiochemistry

programme.title: Bill Baileys Vietnam
programme.desc: Bill arrives in the mountains surrounding Sa Pa, where he goes hunting for herbs with the local Red Dao hill tribe and finds the peace hes been seeking in the form of a tiny wood barrel bath. Bill savours the delights of mountain-top ice-cream, indigo dying, and the friendship of a buffalo. But the true sounds of solace, from rare traditional instruments in isolated mountain villages, need to be heard to be believed

programme.title: Moonfall (2022)
programme.desc: A mysterious force knocks the Moon from its orbit and sends the Earths only natural satellite on a collision course with our planet. Astronauts Jocinda Fowler and Brian Harper, who served together on an ill-fated space mission, join forces with conspiracy theorist KC Houseman to avert catastrophe. Director Roland Emmerichs sci-fi thriller, starring Patrick Wilson, Halle Berry, John Bradley and Donald Sutherland in one of his final films

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Its a night of personality, passion and surprise pairings as Rebecca, a Boris Johnson fan, finds her political match in Bradley. Paris and Serena navigate chemistry and chaos over a spilled drink, while seaside-loving midwife Anna meets her sensitive surfer in Luke. Cormac, a vintage-obsessed 24-year-old, finds the heat with bold 58-year-old Lorraine

programme.title: Barbarian (2022)
programme.desc: In town for a job interview, a young woman arrives at her bed and breakfast late at night only to find that it has been mistakenly double-booked and a strange man is already staying there. Against her better judgement, she decides to stay the night anyway. Horror thriller, starring Georgina Campbell, Justin Long and Bill Skarsgard

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Loudonville, Ohio, to rescue Landolls Mohican Castle, a custom-built, multimillion-dollar hotel set in an 1100-acre woodland estate. Co-owner Marta is struggling, having been left with the entire burden of running such a large establishment alone. Can Gordon persuade her son Jimmy to finally take the reins and turn this business around before the family legacy is destroyed?

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: A fallen scrambler with head and neck injuries is precariously lodged at the edge of a waterfall for several hours and moving him threatens further problems.
