Lewis speaks to MPs, advisors and pollsters, as well as celebrity critics and journalists, and follows the unfolding story as the police make arrests, opposition closes in, and the clamour for information intensifies over what Keir Starmer and his top team knew about Mandelson and Epstein

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the weeks biggest and best shows

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Nabil Abdulrashid and Charlotte Church for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Sarah Millican: Control Enthusiast
programme.desc: A stand-up performance by the comedian, including topics such as road rage, IBS, her favourite word and how she lets her husband know tonights the night. There are also stories about Rescue Men, passing wind in hospital pants, what can happen at a bra fitting and how she feels about her belly

programme.title: Bill Bailey Qualmpeddler
programme.desc: Stand-up comedy from Londons Hammersmith Apollo, targeting everything from the coalition and popular culture to shark-diving. Theres also plenty of light-hearted musical numbers throughout, including religious dubstep, German folk-metal, a Bible-guitar, a Jewish clap-along take on the Match of the Day theme and a reggae version of Downton Abbey, plus the extraordinary tale of a rescued owl

programme.title: Benedetta (2021)
programme.desc: Benedetta Carlini arrives at the Convent of the Mother of God in Pescia, northern Italy as a child. In adulthood, she experiences powerful visions of Jesus, and her proclamations draw crowds to the convent. However, Benedettas faith is tested by the arrival of a young woman called Bartolomea, who arouses forbidden lust. Historical drama, starring Virginie Efira, Charlotte Rampling and Lambert Wilson. In French

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Joe Lycett and comedian Jessica Fostekew head to Lanzarote, known as the island of a thousand volcanoes. The duo hire a trike to discover the lunar landscape and sample volcanic wine in the surreal and surprisingly fertile region of La Geria, before stopping off for a traditional meal of limpets and bienmesabe. They then visit the Jameos del Agua, a partially collapsed lava tube that houses a restaurant, concert hall and crystalline lagoon, home to a tiny blind albino crab found nowhere else in the world. Then its on to Puerto Calero for a submarine safari and a trip to the Jardin de Cactus, which incorporates a cafe serving cactus croquettes

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Charing, Kent, where landlady Natalie Palmer hopes to show that her BandB, The Oak, is better than any of her guests establishments. Everything starts off well when a couple are delighted to have enough room for their yoga mats, but the rest of the party are unimpressed with the extractor fans

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants visit the White Lady in Worstead, Norfolk, on their second night, where proprietor Dennis Gilligan tells his guests about a spooky presence that resides there. The guests get competitive in a round of clay shooting, and debate whether they believe in the existence of ghosts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Cranleigh House BandB in Combe Martin, Devon, where former couple Katherine Armitage and Stewart Johnston offer alternative accommodation for those who enjoy yoga and are seeking spiritual enlightenment. They hope the group will send out energy for world peace and healing, but Mike and Denise question whether the whole thing is a joke

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mike and Denise Mitchell welcome the contestants to Beaches BandB in Paignton, Devon, which only opened for business a few weeks ago. Fellow competitor Katherine puts the owners through their paces at breakfast when she asks for something off the menu, and the hosts are pleasantly surprised at feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners come together for one last time to discover what they have been paid, and the identity of the winner. The Oak owner Natalie wants to know why some of her guests were not enthused by her extractor fans, but she herself receives aggression from Dennis over her criticism of the White Lady. Katherine and Stuart defend their vegetarian breakfast, and Mike and Denise deal with negative comments about their cereal selection

programme.title: Kirsties Fill Your House for Free
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp comes to the rescue of Dave and Kate, whose house has been flooded

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Arthur is admitted to hospital for heart surgery and while leafing through an extensive scrapbook Carrie discovers her fathers hidden secrets. Meanwhile, Doug soon regrets makes friends with a quirky stranger in the wards. Comedy, starring Jerry Stiller and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: When Arthur has a fall, Doug installs a camera in the basement to keep a watchful eye on him - but Deacon, Spence and Danny become addicted to spying on the pensioner. Meanwhile, Carrie decides to buy life insurance, filling her husband with fear for the future. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: A slice of wedding cake triggers off memories of Carries uneasiness prior to her big day and a desperate search for reassurance from God about her marriage to Doug. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra wants to buy an expensive dress for Ally to wear to a friends 13th birthday party, but Ray refuses to spend $250 on something that will only be used once, and naturally Marie takes his side. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Madylin Sweeten

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert contemplates leaving the police force to take up a job selling security systems, but the proposal receives a mixed reaction, leading to tense celebrations at his birthday party. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Brad Garrett and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is delighted to be awarded an honorary doctorate, but hurts Debras feelings by thanking everyone except her in his acceptance speech. He claims it was an accident, though she takes the opportunity to remind him of past snubs that were obviously deliberate

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles tries to settle a score with a plastic surgeon, only to find himself attracted to her, while Frasier is disappointed by the lack of achievements listed in his obituary when it is published prematurely

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frederick does his best to get Frasier and Lilith back together during a Thanksgiving visit. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, Bebe Neuwirth and Trevor Einhorn

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. A bout of crippling back pain prompts Frasier to begin taking strong medication - which dulls his senses and causes him to accidentally blurt out a long-held secret to Daphne. Comedy, with Kelsey Grammer and Jane Leeves

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer enters Lisa in a beauty pageant to boost her self-esteem, and has the satisfaction of seeing her crowned runner-up - but she finds her principles heavily compromised as a result. Featuring the voice of Bob Hope

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart misbehaves once too often, prompting Homer and Marge to impose a terrible punishment - banning him from ever going to see the new feature-length Itchy and Scratchy film, and standing firm despite his constant pleas

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Steve Jones presents action from the battle for grid positions for the third round of the season, held at Suzuka Circuit. With analysis from Billy Monger and Lawrence Baretto

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes a job at the power plant to help with the cost of repairing the family home, which is sliding off its foundations. With the voice of Tom Jones

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart develops a crush on babysitter Laura Powers and plots to break up her relationship with bullying boyfriend Jimbo Jones - but things do not turn out as planned. Featuring the voice of Sara Gilbert (Roseanne, The Big Bang Theory)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at The Peniarth Arms in Bryncrug, where host Susanne Fox is joined by her best friend and colleague Anwen Roberts, but a revelation raises some eyebrows

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Toby Rhys Davies is second to host at Apple Camping in Redberth, Pembrokeshire, where he hopes his unique take on glamping will impress his rivals. The UFO and aeroplane accommodation prove a hit with the guests - but come feedback time, theres just something missing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the Garden House in Blagdon, Somerset, where host and chef Ryan Blackman is hoping his breakfast will wow his guests. But when morning comes around, Susanne and Anwen find their brekkie hard to stomach

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guest house owners head to Ivy House in St Austell, Cornwall, home to James Earl. Susanne and Anwen marvel at the delightful views, but the lack of a lock is a key issue for Ryan and Sarah. At breakfast, Tobys PJs are on the menu but its the sausage thats under scrutiny for Susanne and Anwen

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guest house owners meet one last time to find out what theyve been paid and to settle some scores. Ryan and Sarah seem rather upset over cleanliness concerns and James wants to chew over some tough breakfast feedback. Some strong opinions are aired, and differences debated before the payments are revealed and a winner is announced

programme.title: Togo (2019)
programme.desc: The true story of a dog who led the transportation of diphtheria antitoxin by sled across Alaska in 1925, despite being considered too small and weak to cope with such an intense journey. Adventure based on a true story, starring Willem Dafoe, Julianne Nicholson, Christopher Heyerdahl and Richard Dormer

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Britains Most Luxurious Train Journeys
programme.desc: A guide to luxury train rides across Britain, beginning with the steam-hauled Saphos train on the Devonshire coast. Train manager Sandra and her hospitality team help a passenger surprise his wife of 40 years with a special anniversary present, while executive chef Nick creates a sumptuous five-course meal and learner steam train driver Ian clocks up more training hours passing alongside the red rock coast

programme.title: Chernobyl: 48 Hours To Escape
programme.desc: Documentary following the first 48 hours following the explosion at the nuclear power plant, charting the safety test that led to the disaster, the heroic efforts to prevent a second even worse explosion, and the evacuation of 50,000 people from the nearby city of Pripyat. Featuring contributions from first-hand witnesses, including the chief operator and medical personnel, historians and professors of radiochemistry

programme.title: Bill Baileys Vietnam
programme.desc: Bill arrives in the mountains surrounding Sa Pa, where he goes hunting for herbs with the local Red Dao hill tribe and finds the peace hes been seeking in the form of a tiny wood barrel bath. Bill savours the delights of mountain-top ice-cream, indigo dying, and the friendship of a buffalo. But the true sounds of solace, from rare traditional instruments in isolated mountain villages, need to be heard to be believed

programme.title: Moonfall (2022)
programme.desc: A mysterious force knocks the Moon from its orbit and sends the Earths only natural satellite on a collision course with our planet. Astronauts Jocinda Fowler and Brian Harper, who served together on an ill-fated space mission, join forces with conspiracy theorist KC Houseman to avert catastrophe. Director Roland Emmerichs sci-fi thriller, starring Patrick Wilson, Halle Berry, John Bradley and Donald Sutherland in one of his final films

programme.title: xXx (2002)
programme.desc: Extreme sports star Xander Cage finds himself in trouble when his daredevil exploits land him behind bars. However, he is offered an intriguing escape route, courtesy of National Security Agent Augustus Gibbons - who thinks the adrenaline junkie is the perfect man to bring down a gang of international terrorists in Prague. Action adventure, starring Vin Diesel, Samuel L Jackson, Asia Argento, Marton Csokas and Michael Roof

programme.title: Barbarian (2022)
programme.desc: In town for a job interview, a young woman arrives at her bed and breakfast late at night only to find that it has been mistakenly double-booked and a strange man is already staying there. Against her better judgement, she decides to stay the night anyway. Horror thriller, starring Georgina Campbell, Justin Long and Bill Skarsgard

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Loudonville, Ohio, to rescue Landolls Mohican Castle, a custom-built, multimillion-dollar hotel set in an 1100-acre woodland estate. Co-owner Marta is struggling, having been left with the entire burden of running such a large establishment alone. Can Gordon persuade her son Jimmy to finally take the reins and turn this business around before the family legacy is destroyed?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another trilogy of spooky stories originally broadcast at Halloween. A Mayan civilisation - with some very familiar-looking members - predicts the end of the world, and a scientific experiment in Springfield ends up lumbering the town with its very own black hole - which threatens to swallow everything and everyone in sight. Finally, a spot of time travel relocates Bart to 1974 for a Back to the Future parody in which he inadvertently jeopardises his parents relationship

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler falls asleep in a meeting - with disastrous consequences. Meanwhile, Rachel desperately searches for a solution to baby Emmas non-stop crying and Ross breaks his finger trying to punch Joey

programme.desc: Monica accepts a job as chef at arenownedManhattan restaurant, while Chandler decides to split his working week between Tulsa and New York. programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes fear that she may be about to lose her latest boyfriend is compounded by Rosss foolish comments. Monica makes a startling discovery about Chandler while visiting him in Tulsa, and Joey is upset to learn his date does not remember having previously slept with him

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel tries to make amends with work rival Gavin, but realises she will never get along with him. Ross urges Joey to stay away from Emmas new nanny, while Phoebe and Mike adopt a litter of rats. Melissa George and Dermot Mulroney guest star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross enlists Chandler to help him make Rachel jealous. Monica gets the chance to perform at Mikes nightclub and Joey seeks help to disguise a botched eyebrow-waxing. Guest starring Dermot Mulroney and Melissa George

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Pregnant Rachel considers moving out, prompting Ross to tell her about a vacancy in his building, and Joey creates a nursery to persuade her to stay. programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra wants to buy an expensive dress for Ally to wear to a friends 13th birthday party, but Ray refuses to spend $250 on something that will only be used once, and naturally Marie takes his side. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Madylin Sweeten

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert contemplates leaving the police force to take up a job selling security systems, but the proposal receives a mixed reaction, leading to tense celebrations at his birthday party. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Brad Garrett and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is delighted to be awarded an honorary doctorate, but hurts Debras feelings by thanking everyone except her in his acceptance speech. He claims it was an accident, though she takes the opportunity to remind him of past snubs that were obviously deliberate

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby - Part One

Phoebe courts a handsome patient, while Monica and Chandler decide there is no time like the present to start a family of their own

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Has a Baby - Part Two

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where No One Proposes

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler falls asleep in a meeting - with disastrous consequences. Meanwhile, Rachel desperately searches for a solution to baby Emmas non-stop crying and Ross breaks his finger trying to punch Joey

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica accepts a job as chef at arenownedManhattan restaurant, while Chandler decides to split his working week between Tulsa and New York. programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes fear that she may be about to lose her latest boyfriend is compounded by Rosss foolish comments. Monica makes a startling discovery about Chandler while visiting him in Tulsa, and Joey is upset to learn his date does not remember having previously slept with him

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rosss Inappropriate Song

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel tries to make amends with work rival Gavin, but realises she will never get along with him. Ross urges Joey to stay away from Emmas new nanny, while Phoebe and Mike adopt a litter of rats. Melissa George and Dermot Mulroney guest star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross enlists Chandler to help him make Rachel jealous. Monica gets the chance to perform at Mikes nightclub and Joey seeks help to disguise a botched eyebrow-waxing. Guest starring Dermot Mulroney and Melissa George

programme.sub-title: The One with the Red Sweater

programme.desc: Rachel reveals the identity of the father of her baby, while Chandler and Monica go on their honeymoon, but are constantly upstaged by another couple who get preferential treatment wherever they go

programme.desc: Ross is horrified to learn Rachel is going on a date with a handsome soap star, and Chandler sabotages a quirky workmates chances of promotion. Meanwhile, Phoebe is attracted to a cute but clumsy chef whom Monica plans to fire. Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox star

programme.sub-title: The One with the Halloween Party

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Pregnant Rachel considers moving out, prompting Ross to tell her about a vacancy in his building, and Joey creates a nursery to persuade her to stay. programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel finally tells her father she is pregnant, prompting him to confront Ross - who is just snuggling up to new girlfriend Mona. Monica feels guilty about denying Chandler a stripper on his stag night so she books one to make amends - but he gets a lot more than he bargained for

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang celebrates Thanksgiving and Monica invites old high-school friend Will, the only student who was fatter than her - unaware of his animosity toward Rachel. programme.desc: Phoebe discovers Ben goes to school with Stings son and immediately sets about trying to wangle free concert tickets. programme.desc: Rachels hormones act up, prompting her to proposition Joey, and Chandlers newly divorced boss takes him to a strip club, convinced he and Monica are having problems. Guest starring Alec Baldwin

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: After being stood up the previous week, Geordie model Georgia ended up flirting with nice guy Alex. Now they are back to pick up where they left off. Baker Chloe prides herself on being a good judge of character, which is just as well because her date, amateur dramatics enthusiast Ben, has played many different roles in his time. Swinging sixties fan Robert is hoping fifties fashionista Amy will accompany him to a Northern Soul night after their meal - although he might have second thoughts when he sees whats tattooed on her toe. Plus, the subject of family life proves to be high on the agenda for make-up artist Verona and fire-fighter Paul, as well as father-of-one Patrick and German-born Thomas

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 22-year-old gym addict Sophie from Surrey, who is desperate to find a man who boasts a little banter. Next up is Dom, a 25-year-old wedding model from Bournemouth. He wants to find the perfect man to waltz him down the aisle and thinks people that can guarantee to do this are confident, daring and adventurous in their outlook

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Twenty seven-year-old single mother and dog groomer Brenna seeks a man who wont be put off by the fact she has a daughter. She hopes to find a connection with dog-loving electrician Ross. Twenty-four-year-old party girl Tori is looking for someone to bring a bit of sparkle into her life. Shes matched with 30-year-old beautician Sophie, whos on the lookout for a life partner. Plus, actress Alice meets 26-year-old cocktail bartender Jac, who is hoping to shake his life up a bit

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay travels to the El Greco restaurant in Austin, Texas, where the owners have resorted to using a microwave to prepare their authentic Greek dishes. Gordon faces the difficult task of uniting a squabbling family before tackling the bigger problem of a business on the brink of collapse

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Moe, Apu and Principal Skinner become stand-in firefighters, and initially prove surprisingly efficient. Unfortunately, they soon decide the job does not pay well enough, and seek other forms of compensation for their heroic acts - by stealing from houses during emergency calls

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Stop or My Dog Will Shoot!
programme.desc: Santas Little Helper is enrolled in the Animal Police Academy and soon graduates, but realises he is not cut out for life as a law-enforcer and rebels by biting Bart - much to the dismay of Marge, who has already bought a python to replace him

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claires plans for a family portrait do not go smoothly, and Cameron reveals his inner diva. Comedy, starring Julie Bowen and Eric Stonestreet

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old car, Mitchell decides to build a large princess castle for Lily, and Manny invites a girl over for a study date - which makes Gloria uncomfortable. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Julie Bowen and Ty Burrell

programme.desc: It is the final day of an action-packed trip around Portugal, and in Albufeira, one celebrity couple will be crowned the winners

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Day the Earth Stood Cool
programme.desc: Homer shakes off the shackles of his traditional lifestyle after hitting it off with his trendy new neighbours, who are the ultimate in cool - although Marge isnt too keen on the hipster clan, especially their parenting style. However, when Bart falls out with one of his new friends kids, the doughnut-loving dad soon sees them for what they really are. With the guest voices of Portlandia stars Fred Armisen and Carrie Brownstein, and Patton Oswalt (Young Adult)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer doesnt seem to care when Santas Little Helper goes missing, puzzling the rest of his family who are all panicking about their missing pooch. So Grampa shares a story about his son, a certain childhood pet and a more youthful but no-less-bitter Mr Burns

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge select Fat Tony to be Maggies godfather, but are worried about his influence on her

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Dad Who Knew Too Little
programme.desc: Homer realises he knows very little about Lisa and tries to fill the gaps in his knowledge by hiring a dodgy private detective to spy on her - only to end up on the wrong side of the law. With the guest voice of Elliott Gould

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The first dater through the doors is no-nonsense Mercedes who worries her date, gamer Greg, wont be able to handle her secret. Fifty-three-year-old jetsetter Georgina has endured many a heartbreak, but still craves fun and excitement, hopefully part-time DJ Steve is the man to provide a romantic soundtrack to her life. Having endured a very public on-screen divorce, Lauren from reality series The Real Housewives of Cheshire, now seeks something a bit more real. Trainee teacher Ashley has been doing his homework when it comes to love and has a long list of requirements for a potential suitor

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum (2019)
programme.desc: The seemingly invincible hero returns, this time with a $14million bounty on his head which rises each hour, and every underworld figure around the world desperate to cash in. However, John Wick does receive support from Sofia, a fellow dog lover, assassin and manager of Casablancas Continental Hotel. Director Chad Stahelskis action thriller sequel, starring Keanu Reeves, Halle Berry and Ian McShane

programme.title: The Inbetweeners Movie (2011)
programme.desc: Awkward teenagers Simon, Will, Jay and Neil plan a holiday to the Greek island of Crete after they finish their exams, hoping to experience drink, sex and debauchery beyond their wildest dreams. However, things do not quite work out as planned. Comedy based on the TV series, with Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twenty six-year-old psychology student Alesia is tired of meeting boys and is now seeking someone more emotionally mature than her previous partners. Next up is Louise from London, who has travelled the world and been on over 200 dates, but is still no closer to finding her soul mate. Anna Richardson assists both singletons, inviting them to choose their favourite partner from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time until fully nude. The contenders then don their glad rags to enjoy a date together

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including The Crown, Survivor, 007: Road to a Million, The Good Ship Murder, Shoplifters: Caught Red Handed and ITV News coverage of the Cabinet reshuffle. From November 2023

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Beverly signs everyone up for a holiday family photo, Geoffrey is excited to join in, despite Ericas reservations. Barry must face the fact that he has not been a good friend

programme.title: The Goldbergs

This time out, Jack and James - along with best man Jay and bridesmaid Alex - are back to reveal what they really thought about their dramatic wedding in 2014, when Jack threw a theatrical big day for his groom

programme.desc: The remaining four teams must build something to replace one of the horses on a carousel at Luna Park amusement park to secure one of the three spots in the final

Next, in a choice between two challenges, the duos must either wash laundry by hand in the Yamuna River or create bricks from a surprising source - cow dung

programme.desc: The group return from Scotland and Kit reveals that hes been messaging Inga, leaving a newly single Jazz left questioning her feelings for her friend. Jules brother Philip finds out that his blossoming bromance with Chuggs is not as mutual as he thought. After attempting to build bridges with Beks in Scotland, Freddy soon finds himself back in her bad books

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Lelas, a Pomona, California, restaurant that is currently being run into the ground by its inexperienced owner. Gordon tries to turn the failing business around, but faces opposition from the chef and makes enemies when he exposes the suspect behaviour of some members of staff

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The first Commitment Ceremony delivers emotional highs, brutal honesty and explosive fallout as Revelations Week takes its toll. While some couples reflect on progress and renewed connection, others are pushed to breaking point. A leave decision shocks everyone in the room, one bride is blindsided, and buried tensions between the brides finally erupt when accusations of inauthenticity spark a fiery showdown between Brook and Stella

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The brides are still divided over Stella and Brooks fallout as Intimacy Week kicks off - which ends in disaster for one bride whose groom refuses to kiss her

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Cherish Finden from Bake Off: The Professionals joins Paul Hollywood in judging the celebrity charity challenge. In a returning comedians special, reigning star baker Joe Wilkinson, Roisin Conaty, Rose Matafeo, Judi Love, Tom Davis and Jon Richardson enter the tent. They attempt breakfast pastries and matcha and yuzu biscuits, before recreating the weirdest places that theyve ever slept, in cake form

programme.title: Toy Story (1995)
programme.desc: A jealous string-pulled cowboy dolls status as his owners favourite plaything is threatened by the arrival of a charismatic hi-tech astronaut figure, who refuses to believe he is simply a toy. However, the rivals are forced to work together when they are left stranded in the outside world. Pixar animated adventure, featuring the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Don Rickles and Jim Varney

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart angrily breaks Lisas treasured saxophone during a petty squabble, prompting Homer and Marge to recall how she acquired it in the first place. Guest starring the voice of Fyvush Finkel

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer buys a handgun to protect his family, but begins using it to perform all kinds of household tasks - prompting Marge and the kids to leave home and move into a sleazy motel

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level (2019)
programme.desc: Players of Jumanji return, but as they attempt to rescue one of their own, they will have to brave parts unknown from arid deserts to snowy mountains, to escape the worlds most dangerous game. programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Rylan and his mother Linda, Jane McDonald and her friend Sue, Miquita and Andi Oliver, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Chris Packham and his stepdaughter Megan, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Fearne Cotton and Gok Wan, Martin and Roman Kemp, Chris McCausland and Donna Preston, Denise Van Outen and Johnny Vaughan, and Bobby, Jeff and Freddie Brazier share opinions on shows including Love Island, The Nevermets and The Yorkshire Vet. programme.title: The Inbetweeners

programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples in north Somerset show off their culinary and hosting skills, Norman and Dee kick things off with an Indian menu that proves too spicy for their guests, followed by young lovebirds Ashley and Sophie - although Ashley lets the side down with an un-ironed shirt. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Artistic couple Zaya and Damian kick off the competition in Cornwall with an aspirational modern British menu. programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Its hammer time in the third series where the property brothers work their makeover magic. Will helping these homeowners be as tough as nails or as easy as flipping a switch? programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Hapless Liam wants his greatest passion to take flight with a darts-inspired wedding, but controlling bride-to-be Chelsey dreams of a much more traditional affair

programme.desc: Sherry and her partner Phil kick-off the contest in Oxfordshire, with a traditional menu with a modern twist served in their grand dining room. programme.desc: Mitch and Cam help Lily overcome her insecurities about wearing a bathing suit to a pool party, but discover they have some of their own. Meanwhile, now that Glorias new internship is taking up so much of her time, Jay is feeling particularly neglected

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The families prepare to woo their significant others on Valentines Day. Claire plans a special, romantic getaway with Phil, and Jay decides to treat Gloria to a stand-up show. Meanwhile, Cam and Mitchell play Cupid for Manny to end his quest for a date

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Twenty seven-year-old single mother and dog groomer Brenna seeks a man who wont be put off by the fact she has a daughter. Shes matched with 30-year-old beautician Sophie, whos on the lookout for a life partner. Plus, actress Alice meets 26-year-old cocktail bartender Jac, who is hoping to shake his life up a bit

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay travels to the El Greco restaurant in Austin, Texas, where the owners have resorted to using a microwave to prepare their authentic Greek dishes. Gordon faces the difficult task of uniting a squabbling family before tackling the bigger problem of a business on the brink of collapse

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Moe, Apu and Principal Skinner become stand-in firefighters, and initially prove surprisingly efficient. programme.sub-title: Stop or My Dog Will Shoot!

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claires plans for a family portrait do not go smoothly, and Cameron reveals his inner diva. Comedy, starring Julie Bowen and Eric Stonestreet

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old car, Mitchell decides to build a large princess castle for Lily, and Manny invites a girl over for a study date - which makes Gloria uncomfortable. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Julie Bowen and Ty Burrell

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Day the Earth Stood Cool
programme.desc: Homer shakes off the shackles of his traditional lifestyle after hitting it off with his trendy new neighbours, who are the ultimate in cool - although Marge isnt too keen on the hipster clan, especially their parenting style. However, when Bart falls out with one of his new friends kids, the doughnut-loving dad soon sees them for what they really are. With the guest voices of Portlandia stars Fred Armisen and Carrie Brownstein, and Patton Oswalt (Young Adult)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer doesnt seem to care when Santas Little Helper goes missing, puzzling the rest of his family who are all panicking about their missing pooch. So Grampa shares a story about his son, a certain childhood pet and a more youthful but no-less-bitter Mr Burns

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge select Fat Tony to be Maggies godfather, but are worried about his influence on her

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Dad Who Knew Too Little
programme.desc: Homer realises he knows very little about Lisa and tries to fill the gaps in his knowledge by hiring a dodgy private detective to spy on her - only to end up on the wrong side of the law. With the guest voice of Elliott Gould

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The first dater through the doors is no-nonsense Mercedes who worries her date, gamer Greg, wont be able to handle her secret. Fifty-three-year-old jetsetter Georgina has endured many a heartbreak, but still craves fun and excitement, hopefully part-time DJ Steve is the man to provide a romantic soundtrack to her life. Having endured a very public on-screen divorce, Lauren from reality series The Real Housewives of Cheshire, now seeks something a bit more real. Trainee teacher Ashley has been doing his homework when it comes to love and has a long list of requirements for a potential suitor

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum (2019)
programme.desc: The seemingly invincible hero returns, this time with a $14million bounty on his head which rises each hour, and every underworld figure around the world desperate to cash in. Director Chad Stahelskis action thriller sequel, starring Keanu Reeves, Halle Berry and Ian McShane

programme.title: The Inbetweeners Movie (2011)
programme.desc: Awkward teenagers Simon, Will, Jay and Neil plan a holiday to the Greek island of Crete after they finish their exams, hoping to experience drink, sex and debauchery beyond their wildest dreams. However, things do not quite work out as planned. Comedy based on the TV series, with Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twenty six-year-old psychology student Alesia is tired of meeting boys and is now seeking someone more emotionally mature than her previous partners. Next up is Louise from London, who has travelled the world and been on over 200 dates, but is still no closer to finding her soul mate. Anna Richardson assists both singletons, inviting them to choose their favourite partner from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time until fully nude. programme.desc: The group return from Scotland and Kit reveals that hes been messaging Inga, leaving a newly single Jazz left questioning her feelings for her friend. After attempting to build bridges with Beks in Scotland, Freddy soon finds himself back in her bad books

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Lelas, a Pomona, California, restaurant that is currently being run into the ground by its inexperienced owner. programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The first Commitment Ceremony delivers emotional highs, brutal honesty and explosive fallout as Revelations Week takes its toll. While some couples reflect on progress and renewed connection, others are pushed to breaking point. A leave decision shocks everyone in the room, one bride is blindsided, and buried tensions between the brides finally erupt when accusations of inauthenticity spark a fiery showdown between Brook and Stella

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The brides are still divided over Stella and Brooks fallout as Intimacy Week kicks off - which ends in disaster for one bride whose groom refuses to kiss her

programme.desc: James is joined by Michelin-starred chef Kenny Atkinson in Northumberland, where the pair learn how mead is made on Holy Island. James cooks up a Singapore-inspired crab and lobster dish on a stunning beach, before he and Kenny enjoy a cruise around Coquet Island, which is an RSPB reserve

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go North
programme.desc: Simon King and Dave Myers start their tour of Northumberland by visiting the seaside town of Amble, before tasting some of the best seafood fresh from the North Sea. The bikers then visit Turvelaws Farm, nestled at the foot of the Cheviot Hills, where they grow nine different varieties of potato

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree prepares some of Ladds favourite foods, including spatchcock BBQ chicken, thin and crispy waffle fries and for dessert spoon cake with gooey chocolate frosting

programme.desc: Ree fills her freezer with Tex-Mex favourites, including green chili pork stew, mac and cheese, and a veggie taco salad

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates more stress-free recipes for dishes that each contain only five ingredients, featuring a tasty tikka chicken roast, a vibrant carrot and grain salad, a super-speedy crab spaghetti, and chocolate orange shortbread

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates more stress-free recipes, preparing sausage carbonara with a peppery punch, a spicy one-pot Thai red chicken soup, a scrambled egg omelette, and steamed pudding with a speedy, sticky marmalade glaze

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: The chef prepares a roasted shrimp with feta in exchange for an ice cream master-class from friend and creamery owner Rori Trovato

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: American chef and cookbook writer Ina Garten prepares tomato crostini and whipped feta. Plus, she makes thyme roasted marcona almonds as a cocktail snack

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Presenters Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins set the remaining contestants three tasks involving pastry, beginning by asking them to make signature savoury parcels. For the technical challenge, they must prepare a cake that hails from the Brittany region of France - the kouign amann, which none of the bakers has ever heard of - before creating two different types of eclair in the showstopper round. Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood judge the hopefuls efforts before deciding who is star baker and who is going home

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The nations favourite baking contest has certainly proved it can hold its own after moving to BBC One - this series has been the most entertaining (not to mention contentious) yet. Its about to get a whole lot hotter in the kitchen, though, as it reaches the quarter-final stage, and just five amateur bakers remain. Theyve all impressed to various extents during Bread Week - at least sufficiently to make it through - but now their skills are thoroughly tested as they take on enriched doughs. They have a signature bake in which they must work with soft dough to create artful works, a technical that sees them recreate an Eastern European cross between bread and pastry, and a showstopper involving doughnuts

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef arrives at the Palace of Versailles, a vast royal hunting lodge which boasts amazing architecture and a great market. He talks about food fashions and seasonality with the director of the Kings allotment, meets a chocolatier who makes enormous chocolate sculptures, which he then casts in bronze or aluminium, and visits Alain Ducasses newly opened Restaurant Ore. Dishes include sole Veronique, roasted spelt and wild mushrooms, and veal chops

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef ends his excursion at the Bois de Boulogne, a park on the outskirts of Paris, coinciding with the hosting of a prestigious steeplechase event at its Auteuil Hippodrome. James meets fellow Yorkshireman and jockey James Revelly and rustles up leeks vinaigrette with salmon and lamb cutlets with a colourful ratatouille. Later, the chef pays a visit to the Michelin-starred Pre Catelan restaurant, where he enjoys his favourite meal of the trip

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James and fellow chef Mark Jordan discover the culinary delights of Guernsey. They sample local speciality Gache cake and a seafood platter fit for a king, while James uses the islands native dairy produce to make a creamy rice pudding with chargrilled peaches. The duo set themselves a fishing challenge by attempting to catch a mighty turbot, and James finishes the day by cooking a mouthwatering turbot dish

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: The chef is joined by Paul Ainsworth to explore the culinary delights of Dorset, with the pair going aboard a millionaires yacht, where James cooks a sea bass dish. Paul samples local cheeses, while James visits a breeder with Mangalitsa pigs in a beautiful coastline setting

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Comfort Food

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Comfort Food
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers prove that home-made can beat shop-bought when they prepare gravlax, jam doughnuts, corned beef and even an Indian favourite, paneer

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go Local
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King travel the country on a mission to bring together the best local restaurants with the most innovative local suppliers. Each week, the duo base themselves in one stunning region, meeting with local chefs in the hopes of inspiring them to find new ingredients from producers that they can showcase on their menus. In the first episode, Dave and Si head to Penarth, South Wales, where they meet a father and daughter team at their restaurant, Home, before heading out to find potential new suppliers that can offer the pair ingredients of the highest quality for their eight-course tasting menu

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates more stress-free recipes for dishes that each contain only five ingredients, featuring a tasty tikka chicken roast, a vibrant carrot and grain salad, a super-speedy crab spaghetti, and chocolate orange shortbread

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates more stress-free recipes, preparing sausage carbonara with a peppery punch, a spicy one-pot Thai red chicken soup, a scrambled egg omelette, and steamed pudding with a speedy, sticky marmalade glaze

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: The chef prepares a roasted shrimp with feta in exchange for an ice cream master-class from friend and creamery owner Rori Trovato

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: American chef and cookbook writer Ina Garten prepares tomato crostini and whipped feta. Plus, she makes thyme roasted marcona almonds as a cocktail snack

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Presenters Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins set the remaining contestants three tasks involving pastry, beginning by asking them to make signature savoury parcels. For the technical challenge, they must prepare a cake that hails from the Brittany region of France - the kouign amann, which none of the bakers has ever heard of - before creating two different types of eclair in the showstopper round. Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood judge the hopefuls efforts before deciding who is star baker and who is going home

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The nations favourite baking contest has certainly proved it can hold its own after moving to BBC One - this series has been the most entertaining (not to mention contentious) yet. Its about to get a whole lot hotter in the kitchen, though, as it reaches the quarter-final stage, and just five amateur bakers remain. Theyve all impressed to various extents during Bread Week - at least sufficiently to make it through - but now their skills are thoroughly tested as they take on enriched doughs. They have a signature bake in which they must work with soft dough to create artful works, a technical that sees them recreate an Eastern European cross between bread and pastry, and a showstopper involving doughnuts

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef arrives at the Palace of Versailles, a vast royal hunting lodge which boasts amazing architecture and a great market. He talks about food fashions and seasonality with the director of the Kings allotment, meets a chocolatier who makes enormous chocolate sculptures, which he then casts in bronze or aluminium, and visits Alain Ducasses newly opened Restaurant Ore. Dishes include sole Veronique, roasted spelt and wild mushrooms, and veal chops

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef ends his excursion at the Bois de Boulogne, a park on the outskirts of Paris, coinciding with the hosting of a prestigious steeplechase event at its Auteuil Hippodrome. James meets fellow Yorkshireman and jockey James Revelly and rustles up leeks vinaigrette with salmon and lamb cutlets with a colourful ratatouille. Later, the chef pays a visit to the Michelin-starred Pre Catelan restaurant, where he enjoys his favourite meal of the trip

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go North

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Founders Day comes to Walnut Grove, and everybody is looking forward to the exciting competitions. While Laura and Mary try to outdo the Olesons, Charles is challenged to a logging contest by an aging lumberjack

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: The Richest Man in Walnut Grove
programme.desc: Charles and his boss anticipate a large income from a big job. However things fail to go according to plan, which puts a financial strain on the family as they pull together to make ends meet

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A decline in Marys school performance is explained when Charles discovers that she needs glasses. However, she loses her confidence when her classmates begin to tease her

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles wants to seed a new field and decides to obtain a loan from the new banker, Ebenezer Sprague. The cold-hearted gentleman refuses to trust Charles and his family until Laura unwittingly befriends him at the fishing hole. Their friendship and its abrupt end shows the banker that no man should worry about making any true friends

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A talented player leaves the townsfolk convinced they will win an annual baseball game. Star pitcher Mumford appears to be an ace up Walnut Groves sleeve, until his wife discovers the townspeople are betting heavily on the games outcome. To put a stop to the madness, she benches him, leaving Caroline to persuade Mrs Mumford to allow him to play. The troubles of the Walnut Grove team are not over, however, between arguments of the rightful name of the team, to Sleepy Eyes Green Stockings win-at-any-cost attitude, the battle for the game is fought in quite an unorthodox manner

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: When Nellie dares Laura to enter a rickety old house, Laura discovers mysterious hermit Amos Pike living there. She learns that he is waiting for his beloved wife, an actress, to return home. Laura excitedly volunteers to help in fixing up the place until a trip to Mankato shows that his wife is in fact dead and not coming back. Laura then must help him overcome his denial and sorrow, when she tells him that his wife is dead

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura wants to go to the annual Spring Dance with Henry Henderson, while Grace Snider hopes Mr Edwards will ask her out. However, both men are too shy to ask the girls. Caroline decides to teach them a technique she used on Charles to make him jealous. While the two girls shamelessly deceive their beaus, Charles reminds Caroline about the exact circumstances that occurred when she tried it on him

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Part one of two. A widow realises she does not have long to live, so asks Charles to find homes for her three children

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Part two of two. Charles has a difficult time trying to find someone who will adopt all three Sanderson children. It looks as if the children will get split up, and while they try to be brave, Alicia breaks down at the thought of leaving her brothers and Grace Snider. At the very last moment, Mr Edwards makes a monumental decision

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mrs Oleson invites herself along on the Ingalls family camp out after concluding that Laura and Mary will have the upper hand collecting leaves for a science project. However, the Ingalls and Olesons seem to mix like water and oil throughout the trip

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: At the End of the Rainbow
programme.desc: Laura and her friend Jonah find pyrite while fishing in a stream, and mistake it for gold. Laura spends her days amassing the gold dust, and begins fantasising about her family being wealthy and the Olesons being poor. However the secrecy leads to squabbling

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The children have a collection to buy a birthday present for the Rev Alden, but Lauras plan to raise even more money goes badly wrong

programme.desc: A man returns to his home town with a new wife, but finds himself haunted by traumatic memories and struggles to overcome the past. Drama from the pen of the celebrated author, starring Susannah York and John Castle

programme.title: The Ruth Rendell Mysteries
programme.desc: A 16-year-old evacuee is sent to live with relatives in the countryside at the height of the Blitz, and witnesses a clandestine liaison between her aunt and an injured pilot. programme.title: Rumpole of the Bailey
programme.sub-title: Rumpole and the Case of Identity

programme.desc: Henry rumbles his sons wild parties when he stumbles across some incriminating evidence - and resolves to sort out his errant offspring. John Thaw and Reece Dinsdale star

programme.desc: Hot Lips returns from Tokyo to announce her engagement to Lieutenant Colonel Penobscott, leaving Frank Burns to vent his fury on a Korean family he arrests as spies. War comedy, starring Loretta Swit and Larry Linville

programme.desc: A sergeant repays a poker debt by arranging Radars promotion to lieutenant. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda, Gary Burghoff and Harry Morgan

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot
