programme.title: The Great Sioux Massacre (1965)
programme.desc: A corrupt senator coaxes Colonel Custer out of retirement with the prospect of presidential office, and the soldier tries to further his political ambitions by wresting control of the current military campaign from its commanding officer, culminating in his last stand at the Battle of the Little Bighorn. Western, with Philip Carey, Joseph Cotten, Darren McGavin and Julie Sommars

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: When a plague sweeps through the Enterprise, Kirk, Spock and McCoy head to a supposedly uninhabited planet to search for the only known antidote. However, their mission is complicated when they encounter an immortal being and his daughter. Sci-fi adventure, starring William Shatner and Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent tries to block the appointment of an alien to a vital post in the space programme. Classic sci-fi drama, starring Roy Thinnes

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The cop is convinced that his latest murder investigation is linked to an unsolved case from eight-years ago and that he might be searching for a serial killer

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker faces a difficult case when investigating a county sheriff who is suspected of murdering a trucker who refused to help him smuggle drugs

programme.title: Contraband (2012)
programme.desc: Successful international smuggler Chris Farraday turns his back on a life of crime to raise a family. However, his brother-in-law crosses a powerful drug lord, who forces Chris to transport billions of dollars of counterfeit money into the US, or his wife and children will be killed. Crime thriller, starring Mark Wahlberg, Kate Beckinsale, Giovanni Ribisi and Ben Foster

programme.title: The Hunted (1995)
programme.desc: An American executive on a business trip to Tokyo witnesses a murder committed by members of a ninja cult, and becomes the only man to have seen the face of their leader and lived. He is marked for death by the sect and hunted by their assassins, but finds an ally in a modern-day samurai who has an ancestral feud with them. Thriller, starring Christopher Lambert, John Lone and Joan Chen

programme.title: The Trust (2016)
programme.desc: Two bumbling police officers working in the evidence room of a Las Vegas station are surprised to discover a bail receipt for an unusually high sum of money. They hatch a plan to find out where this money came from, and steal it for themselves. Comedy thriller, starring Nicolas Cage, Elijah Wood and Jerry Lewis

programme.title: The Black Torment (1964)
programme.desc: A woman investigates the supernatural events which seem to be linked to the suicide of her aristocratic husbands first wife. Ghost story set in the 18th century, starring John Turner, Heather Sears and Ann Lynn

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Collision Earth (2011)
programme.desc: The planet Mercury is struck by a solar flare that sends it on a collision course with Earth. A disgraced scientist must reactivate his defunct plans for a new weapons system to save the world, while an astronaut whose spaceship was orbiting Mercury faces a struggle to survive. Sci-fi thriller, starring Kirk Acevedo

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent is falsely accused of murder and an offensive is launched against the aliens

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: One of Vincents scientists proves the existence of aliens, but then goes berserk and is declared insane

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent learns a crime syndicate are hunting the aliens to recover stolen narcotics

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent offers proof of the existence of aliens to a senior military commander, who requests peace talks with the invaders. Classic sci-fi drama, starring Roy Thinnes

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent tries to block the appointment of an alien to a vital post in the space programme. Classic sci-fi drama, starring Roy Thinnes

programme.title: Frankenstein Created Woman (1967)
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein has acquired the dead body of a woman, but lacks the means to bring it to life. He finds success by transplanting the soul of a killer into the corpse, with predictably gruesome results. Hammer horror, starring Peter Cushing, Thorley Walters, Susan Denberg and Robert Morris

programme.title: The Buccaneer (1958)
programme.desc: A general charged with the defence of New Orleans in 1812 learns the British are sending a vast fleet to retake the city. His only hope is to form an alliance with a notorious pirate - but while the buccaneers loyalties are to his homeland, his crew urges him to side with the invaders. Remake of Cecil B DeMilles classic swashbuckling adventure, directed by Anthony Quinn, starring Yul Brynner, Charlton Heston, Claire Bloom and Charles Boyer

programme.title: Treasure Island (1972)
programme.desc: A boy discovers a map leading to the location of an infamous pirates buried treasure. He joins a voyage in search of the loot, only to discover the ship has been infiltrated by several of the buccaneers former crew, who plan to seize the riches for themselves. Adventure based on Robert Louis Stevensons novel, starring Orson Welles and Kim Burfield

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An opal ring possesses mysterious forces, enabling its wearer to see images of loved ones

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A car forces its owner to admit to a hit-and-run crime

programme.title: The Last Stand (2013)
programme.desc: Disgraced narcotics cop Ray Owens retires into a quiet life as sheriff of a small town on the Mexican border. He gets the chance to prove his worth as a law enforcer when a drug lord escapes from prison and tries to flee the US - with his escape route taking him through Rays jurisdiction. Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Johnny Knoxville and Forest Whitaker

programme.title: D-Tox (2002)
programme.desc: A bereaved FBI agent turns to alcohol to cope with the unsolved murder of his girlfriend and is sent to an isolated rehab clinic to recuperate. Unfortunately, it soon becomes clear that her killer has followed him and is intent on picking off his fellow patients one by one - forcing him to pull himself together in a bid to prevent more deaths. Thriller, with Sylvester Stallone, Polly Walker, Tom Berenger and Kris Kristofferson

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day (2012)
programme.desc: A man on a sailing holiday in Spain discovers his family have been abducted. His search for them leads him to learn that his father has been leading a double-life as a CIA agent, and has stolen top-secret information - which the kidnappers will stop at nothing to obtain. Thriller, starring Henry Cavill, Bruce Willis and Sigourney Weaver

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called to a man under arrest. Hes outside in the street and has hit his head, and the police want to make sure hes well enough to be taken to the station. A mum calls 999 when her six-year-old son has a seizure, and a nurse finds her patient in bed with a fever and having difficulty breathing. The paramedics suspect that he may have fractured a rib

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.sub-title: The Older You Get, the More Serious it Can Be
programme.desc: This compilation episode takes a look at some of the injuries that the UKs elderly population have suffered from, such as a man whos fallen while collecting his morning paper and has badly hit his head. Paramedics also treat a man who has collapsed at home with dangerously high blood sugar levels, as well as a woman whos fallen over while out shopping and may have broken her leg

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Tensions run high at Kings College Hospital when police suspect a patient is concealing a weapon, while maybe mother-of-four Hillary arrives in resus with a severe head injury after falling from her horse. Icylyns bloated abdomen baffles the medical team and she has to wait overnight for a diagnosis, and 14-year-old Chloe receives treatment following her involvement in a fight

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Sister Jen is on duty in resus looking after 48-year-old Bobby, who has been suffering from seizures at home. Bobby has spent most of his adult life in prison for a number of violent crimes including murder. Meanwhile, 70-year-old Ronald had to cut short his 46th wedding anniversary celebrations after experiencing breathing difficulties, and Rienelle, seven, receives treatment after falling from the top of a climbing frame at school

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: London-based teacher Angela takes the group out of the city to a vineyard to learn about the history and taste the local wine, but some members of the group take it too far. She blows the budget on a luxury boutique hotel in the hills but since the wine has been flowing all day long, the conversation is a little worse for wear

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Brigitte Tee is upset to discover she has been given only one point for cleanliness and a heated exchange results in a walk-out, before the winner is announced

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien are in Surrey, where they visit a collector of Kawasaki motorbikes

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Gary and Jennifer from Northern Ireland are childhood sweethearts, who after 40 years together want to start a new chapter in their lives by buying a holiday home near the traditional Spanish town of Vera, on the Costa de Almería. For their £55,000 budget, theyd ideally love a property thats close to the beach, where they can enjoy long walks with their West Highland terrier. Ben Hillman shows them five options for the pair to consider

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition takes place in and around Aberdeen, where 32-year-old offshore logistics supervisor Michelle, hopes to win over her guests with her Weegie wit and prove that Glaswegians have more fun. The guests shes out to impress are 46-year-old year farmer Turid, 30-year-old comedy promoter Naz, 28-year-old gas and oil purchasing specialist Sylvian and 21-year-old economics student David. After a tagine with a Glaswegian twist and the mother of all balloon games, what more can she possibly do to charm her guests?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Confident economics undergraduate David is next to host in Aberdeen, but will his student grub earn him 10 out of 10 with his guests? The 1920s Gatsby-themed dress code goes down a storm with almost everyone, on a night featuring food ending up on the floor, smoke alarms going off and some entertaining cocktail-making

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Oil and gas purchasing specialist Sylvian hosts the third dinner party in Aberdeen, hoping her attention to detail and an ambitious global themed menu will be enough to impress her guests. Philippines-born Sylvians dishes are an East-meets-West affair, starting with Japanese gyoza, followed by a Sumatran rendang and ending with a very British sticky toffee pudding. But dessert turns out to be sticky in more ways than one; cue tears before bedtime from the host

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Aberdeen, its the turn of comedy promoter Naz to host. If Naz is to stand a chance of winning the competition, he must find a way to placate his guests, nearly all of whom he has managed to offend over the week. Naz is, by his own admission, not the greatest cook and things dont go according to plan and much of his food is burned and difficult to chew. Ever the eternal optimist however, Naz thinks that his humour and conviviality will win over his critics and earn him the grand

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night of the competition in Aberdeen finds journalist Turid hoping her home-grown produce will tantalise her guests taste buds. Can Turid knock Sylvian off the top spot and walk away with the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Abbey Court Guest House in Carlisle. After an afternoon of abseiling, the wastage at breakfast leaves some with a bad taste in their mouths

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals head to the Lime Tree Inn in the Yorkshire village of Great Ouseburn, run by chef Rob and his ex-model wife Heloisa. The guests expect big things from the glamorous couple but things get off to a tricky start when Pav questions the value for money and Kelly gives the bathroom a dusting off

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals are glamping at Holly Grove Farm in Staffordshire. Hosts Dave and Karon believe it is a rural idyll and their guests agree - apart from one, who is not happy with their size of their hut

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lincolnshire is the last destination of the week, where Pav is on hosting duties at his Beldon House BandB. The grand exterior gets the guests feeling fancy, but dirty discoveries in the rooms leave some feeling bugged out. At least the BandBers all enjoy a good nights sleep - only to be ruined by instant coffee the following morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers, before discovering who has won the latest competition. Abbey Court Guest Houses Kelly wants to sink her teeth into her breakfast score, while The Lime Tree Inn operators have some qualms about Pavs facilities comments. Pavs under the microscope again for the poor sleep score he gave Holly Grove Farm, before he cleans up everyones cleanliness concerns

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Dorset to pick up a Ford Escort MK2 RS2000, which belongs to carpenter Mike. After his son was involved in a horrific road accident, Mike gave up work and supported him through a four-year recovery. Now, Mikes family want to give something back to offer thanks to such a devoted father by presenting him with his fully restored RS2000

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head off to Loughborough, Leicestershire, to take on a 1992 Saab 900 Turbo thats in desperate need of repair. The car belongs to Saab enthusiast and former electrical engineer Pravesh. Sadly, due to ill health, Pravesh has been left with little strength to work on the car, so its been left to rot. His family believe getting his Saab back on the road would give him the boost he needs

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps Jay and Charlene, parents to one-year-old Kai, who bought and refurbished their two bed home in Romford, Essex but now want to upsize to Chelmsford. Meanwhile, Phil Spencer assists Jemma and Graham, who returned from Los Angeles three years ago and want to settle in Southend-on-Sea

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Christine Attwood and Tony Congdon in Purley, Croydon, who need help deciding whether they should sell or upgrade their home. The pair have been going back and forth for almost a decade about the future of their unusual bungalow - Tony loves the property and its location, but Christine longs to move closer to the coast to enjoy her retirement

programme.title: Blanca
programme.desc: Blanca receives an anonymous call about a disturbance at the crumbling palazzo where Liguoris eccentric uncle lives. A body is found and connections to the local drug trade are exposed, but Uncle Edoardo blames the ghosts that have been haunting him. In Italian

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The team treats 78-year-old Kevin, who suffered a cardiac arrest at the gym and fortunately received life-saving treatment at the scene from an instructor trained to use a portable defibrillator. Meanwhile, 23-year-old paramedic Declan is sent for an emergency CT scan, and Monica, 83, is experiencing numbness in her leg following a fall at home, and her initial X-ray appears to indicate she has a broken neck

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The documentary follows the work of the stroke team at south Londons Kings College Hospital. Lauras family faces a big decision when the 72-year-old grandmother is found to have a blood clot on her brain, while father-of-three Nic, the over-40s National BMX Champion, collapses in reception after suffering an accident while training for a stunt. The medics also treat 83-year-old Marjorie, who is complaining of a pain behind her eye following a recent bout of shingles

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The East Anglian Air Ambulance crew fight to save their patients partially amputated hand in Stowmarket and a crew in High Wycombe to help a man in cardiac arrest. The Essex and Herts Air Ambulance team deal with Beckys badly broken ankle in Chelmsford and in Hatfield, a motorcyclist suffers multiple injuries after a collision with a van

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The team treats 78-year-old Kevin, who suffered a cardiac arrest at the gym and fortunately received life-saving treatment at the scene from an instructor trained to use a portable defibrillator. Meanwhile, 23-year-old paramedic Declan is sent for an emergency CT scan, and Monica, 83, is experiencing numbness in her leg following a fall at home, and her initial X-ray appears to indicate she has a broken neck

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Social influencer Lubomba from Oxford treats his rivals to some high-octane jet skiing, before a Spanish-style dinner and a dance. But confusion with the cuisine causes tension

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Portsmouth at the Seacrest Hotel, where owner Antoinette Stretton and general manager Carmen Cretu hope their experience will set them apart

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Best friends Glenn McGregor and Leon Fernholdt hope to raise the bar when it comes to hosting at The White Horse Hotel in Storrington, West Sussex. The discovery of damp is a cause for concern - and emotions run high as the scores are handed out

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Deri-Down Guesthouse in Abergavenny, Wales, where husbands and wife Mike and Del Hayward hope to impress their rivals

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Royle Farm in Staffordshire, where mother and son Margaret and Fraser Mountford hope their farmhouse with a difference will capture the guests imaginations

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet up for a final showdown. First to seek some answers on their feedback are Antoinette and Carmen, who want to uncover Glenn and Leons bedtime blues and share with Mike and Del why their feedback drove them potty. Next, Glenn and Leon comb through Mike and Dels cleanliness comments, before delving into discussions of damp with Antoinette and Carmen. After opinions are aired and differences debated, the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig Rowe helps photographer and videographer Geoff to find a holiday home on the Caribbean island of Barbados, with Geoffs friend Alan on board to size up potential properties

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman heads to the inland towns and villages of Almería province in southern Spain to help house-hunters Candy and Mark find the perfect holiday home. The couple, who are planning to get married in six months time, are looking for a rural retreat to escape to whenever they can. Ben shows them five attractive options for their budget of £75,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi heads to Poitou-Charentes in the west of France to help house-hunters Jules and Gaynor. Along with their pet alpacas, theyre planning a permanent move to rural France to run their own gîte business. Sara shows them the best of what their £250,000 budget can buy in the local market

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Doc and Lucia have decided to rent out their home in Devon and buy a permanent home in Andalucía, southern Spain. Their plan is to spend half their time in Spain and the rest backpacking around world. Laura Hamilton presents the pair with five properties in the whitewashed town of Alora, all within their £110,000 budget

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: in Cardiff, DJ Trishna hopes her cooking will be even better than her rapping, as she hosts a hip-hop themed night in a bid to scoop the £1000 prize. However, when Yuno shakes his booty on the dance floor, opera-loving Nick is unimpressed and flirty Michelle lets her hands do the talking

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the second day of the competition in Cardiff and Nick is planning to bring some refinement and fine dining to the weeks proceedings. However, fastidious Nick really has set himself a mountain to climb with a massive tasting menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the third day in Cardiff, retail manager Yuno hopes to scoop the prize by whisking his guests off to the Himalayas. As well as entertaining his guests with some traditional dancing, Yunos also hoping to tickle their taste buds by serving up Nepalese food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its day four of the competition in Cardiff and turn of self-appointed hostess with the mostest Michelle. Shes out to impress with a culinary trip around the world, but when she sets a fun challenge, she ends up being accused of cheating

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night of the competition in Cardiff, host Suzanne is pinning her hopes on an evening of sophistication and fine French cuisine. Suzannes menu is inspired by her many holidays to France - in fact shes been every year for the last 17 years. However, revealing the inspiration behind her starter might be a step too far for her guests, especially after the revelations found inside her special cupboard!

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: This weeks competition kicks off at The Oaks Luxury Lodges in County Londonderry. A guided tour of iconic sights goes down well, but a full Irish breakfast proves divisive

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Bridie hosts the weeks second visit, at Pine Tree Hollow Glamping in Leitrim, Co Down, and is keen to show her guests that back to basics does not mean boring

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Isabel and her right-hand woman Aisling aim to wow the guests at their luxury Ness Wood Glamping site in Co Londonderry

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Dulrush Fishing Lodge on the banks of Lough Erne in Co Fermanagh, run by husband-and-wife team Bridie and James. The BandBers are in awe of the shoreline location, but one pair are disappointed to make some dusty discoveries. Naturally, Bridie and James take their guests out on the water for a spot of fishing, where a confession makes waves

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet for one last time to debate their differences and settle some scores. The Oaks Luxury Lodges want to clear up some breakfast bombshells, while Bridie from Pine Tree Hollow Glamping is keen to flush out the problem with her shared facilities. Isabel and Aisling want answers over some tit-for-tat comments, before James and Bridie from Dulrush Fishing Lodge pull back the covers on their bedtime blues

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Brian, 74, is brought into Kings by ambulance after falling backwards down a flight of stairs and being knocked unconscious at his partners house. Sylvester arrives in paediatric AandE with his two-year-old son, who has cut his forehead on a visit to church, while 70-year-old builder Leonard has lost sensation down his left side and the medics are worried he may have suffered a stroke

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Ellen, 86, has been brought in by ambulance after her daughters found her collapsed at home. Her body temperature has dropped dangerously low and shes also lost five pints of blood. Meanwhile, appendicitis is suspected when 75-year-old Martin is rushed in with severe abdominal pain, and neurologists perform tests to determine whether 70-year-old mother-of-10 Lula has suffered a stroke

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Its a busy Mothers Day at south Londons Kings College Hospital as 23-year-old builder Jamie is rushed in by paramedics having fallen from the roof of a three-storey building, landing on a brick wall. The team performs an emergency ultrasound to determine whether he has suffered internal injuries or fractured his ribs and spine, and spot a punctured lung that needs to be reinflated. Four-month-old Weston has been brought to paediatric AandE after suffering from diarrhoea and vomiting for more than 24 hours, while doctors suspect David, 74, has had a stroke. Junior doctor Matt looks after 80-year-old Daphne, who has dislocated her replacement hip

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.sub-title: The Older You Get, the More Serious it Can Be

programme.desc: As the indigenous peoples of Alaska face a changing and unforgiving climate, they turn to the values of the past as a guide to their future

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: The plan to end the war in Europe by winter 1944 founders as Allied forces massed on the German border find themselves perilously short of fuel, leading commanders to take a risky gamble and parachute thousands of additional troops behind enemy lines. In the Pacific, General MacArthur heads one of the most brutal campaigns of the conflict while taking the island of Peleliu

programme.title: Weathered: Earths Extremes

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: How recent investigations at Pompeii - the Roman city located in southern Italy that was destroyed by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius in 79AD - have revealed a dark underbelly of lawlessness, murder and political intrigue. Could this explain the mystery of dozens of bodies found sheltering in a warehouse - some laden with treasure, others stripped of all worldly goods?

programme.title: Los Angeles: Stories from the City
programme.desc: Part two of two. Los Angeles, one of the largest cities in the United States and the world, has a unique story. As this documentary reveals, in the space of less than 150 years LA has transformed itself from a little lawless cow town into one of the biggest cities on the planet

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: Examining General MacArthurs campaign to liberate the Philippines and his resultant popularity back home in America - which belied the scale of the bloodshed necessary for victory. The documentary also studies the US Armys losses in late autumn 1944, while trying to force its way through the heavily defended Hurtgen Forest and Vosges Mountains, which lie on Germanys eastern border

programme.title: The M Factor: Shredding the Silence on Menopause
programme.desc: Menopause is a silent epidemic that affects the health and wellbeing of millions of women. In addition to experiencing traumatic physical symptoms, women often struggle with related emotional stresses. Despite its universality, menopause remains mired in silence and misinformation, exacerbating the broader crisis in womens health. Symptoms can derail careers, disrupt relationships and cause unnecessary physical suffering. This film confronts this neglected crisis, challenges societal and medical misunderstandings, and advocates for a revolutionary approach to womens health

programme.desc: As all 5,000 artifacts from Tutankhamuns tomb are brought together at the Grand Egyptian Museum, a far stranger tale is emerging of the young pharoahs supernatural experences after death. Egyptolologists gather and attempt to decode the secrets of Tuts underworld adventure

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: In 2011, the chilling discovery of 30 massacred bodies on a Swedish island revealed an ancient Nordic murder mystery - a warrior tribe brutally murdered by its rivals in a power struggle that would eventually lead to the rise of the Vikings

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: How recent investigations at Pompeii - the Roman city located in southern Italy that was destroyed by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius in 79AD - have revealed a dark underbelly of lawlessness, murder and political intrigue. Could this explain the mystery of dozens of bodies found sheltering in a warehouse - some laden with treasure, others stripped of all worldly goods?

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: How, in 2017, divers along the Tunisian coast made the discovery of the submerged ancient ruins of a vital Roman outpost, heralding the mystery of Romes sunken city

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: How a massive volcanic eruption in 44 BC may have hastened the end of the ancient Egyptian empire

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: How the discovery of an executed man in Northern Italy revealed the brutal truth behind the Roman practice of crucifixion and shed new light on the most famous crucifixion of all

programme.title: Los Angeles: Stories from the City
programme.desc: Part one of two. Los Angeles, one of the largest cities in the United States and the world, has a unique story. As this documentary reveals, in the space of less than 150 years LA has transformed itself from a little lawless cow town into one of the biggest cities on the planet

programme.title: Los Angeles: Stories from the City

programme.title: Massacre in Vietnam: My Lai

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Brenton West and leather expert Suzie Fletcher work their collective magic on an antique camera. A childhood puppet and an unusual timepiece are also restored. Presented by Jay Blades

programme.title: The Derbyshire Auction House
programme.desc: A couple have no idea how valuable their huge haul of gold coins, watches and jewellery is. And a couple have some rare masonic regalia to sell

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell follow the story of reunited siblings Geoffrey Tonks and Barbara Jacobs as they investigate a family mystery and try to trace a missing sister on Geoffreys fathers side. They also catch up with Robert Lindsay, who explores the difficulties of building a father/son relationship so late in life, and brother and sister Nicholas Rhoades and Cayley Cox talk about how they have already experienced an enormous amount together in the year that has passed since they met for the first time

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell follow three stories of sons coming to terms with the past, including Marc Wolfes struggle to form a bond with his birth mother Esther, who lives in New Zealand. However, his search for identity didnt end there as researchers were able to reunite him with his birth father David, and the pair have grown close. One significant hurdle remained in the form of introducing David to his adoptive father Terry, and cameras were there as Marc introduces his two dads to each other

programme.title: Valkyrie (2008)

Starring Tom Cruise, Kenneth Branagh, Bill Nighy and Tom Wilkinson

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming heads across the Irish Sea to Dublin, where he succumbs to the citys famous charm and meets some of its most fascinating characters. On a journey that takes in an 18th-century pleasure house and a burlesque life-painting class, Alan also stops off in Temple Bar for a pint with singer Sharon Corr, unlocks a mystery in Irelands oldest library and uncovers a stylish secret that lurks behind the steel shutters of an old lock-up

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: After overthrowing her husband and having his successor jailed and eventually murdered, Russian empress Catherine II will stop at nothing to keep her position. She sees her own son as a threat to her and refuses to marry the man who helped her to power for fear he will share the crown. Historical drama following the German-born empress of Russia towards the end of her reign. Starring Helen Mirren and Jason Clarke

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: Potemkin returns and hopes to begin a relationship with Catherine, only to discover she has fallen for Lieutenant Vasilchikov. Meanwhile, Prince Paul becomes increasingly frustrated at the perceived refusal of his succession

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: Catherine struggles to deal with Potemkins moods and jealousy and tragedy strikes for Paul, forcing her to resort to extreme measures

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: In the final episode, Potemkin is forced to fight for Catherine and for Russia once again, and the exertion of war begins to take its toll on their relationship

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Rhaenyra struggles to come to terms with her sons murder, Alicent grows concerned by Aegons Small Council. Return of the fantasy drama set 200 years before the events of Game of Thrones and telling the story of House Targaryen. Starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra questions Daemons loyalty as Otto schemes to turn the public against her, while Ser Criston Cole concocts a misguided plan for revenge

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As ancient grudges resurface, Rhaenys suggests that Alicent may see reason while the men around her seek bloodshed. Ser Criston proposes a bold scheme, while Daemon arrives at Harrenhal to raise an army for the Blacks

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.sub-title: The Red Dragon and the Gold
programme.desc: In Rhaenyras absence and with no word from Daemon at Harrenhal, Rhaenys tries to keep the peace on the Black Council as Cole mounts a campaign into the Crownlands. In Kings Landing, Aemond continues to undermine Aegons fragile hold on authority. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Amid whispers of bad omens, the Greens consider how to fill a void on Aegons council, while Jacaerys sets out on a rogue mission to strike a deal. Daemon enlists Lord Willem Blackwood to help persuade the Brackens to bend the knee

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: With few options left, Rhaenyra summons a trusted knight for a risky venture and plots with Mysaria to catalyse the smallfolk. Meanwhile, Daemons unease grows, and Aemond takes steps to reshape the Green Council

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Rhaenyra looks to gain an advantage by unusual means, Daemon puts pressure on Oscar Tully to raise up his bannermen

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Aemond becomes more volatile, Larys plots an escape and Rhaenyra looks to press home her advantage. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.sub-title: Missouri Mutual Life and Health Insurance Company
programme.desc: Eager to please, Clark ramps up his support for Floyds health and financial wellness, while Carol makes her lover swear to secrecy

programme.title: The Time Travelers Wife
programme.desc: Clare invites Henry to a dinner party, but when its crashed by another Henry, secrets are spilled. Meanwhile, Clare tries to make her 18th birthday perfect

programme.title: The Time Travelers Wife
programme.desc: Henry finally has a chance to step inside Clares home and meet her family. Meanwhile, Henry and Gomez flounder on their path to friendship. Starring Rose Leslie

programme.title: The Time Travelers Wife
programme.desc: As their wedding day nears, a stressed Henry begins to travel more than ever. Meanwhile, the future Clare envisioned with Henry slips out of reach

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: As Kendall, Shiv and Roman hone their pitch for investors in Los Angeles, Logan learns of a rival bid. Drama, starring Brian Cox and Jeremy Strong

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: While Kendall, Shiv and Roman consider an aggressive move regarding the Matsson deal, Connor tries to make the most of his wedding rehearsal dinner

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: While Logan doles out an unsavoury task to Roman ahead of his trip to meet Matsson, Connor fixates on small details at his wedding.

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. The programme explores how the reality of life in Britains grand houses is often less glamorous than it appears, as proprietors struggle to maintain crumbling buildings and pay utility bills, and examines the modern-day divide between domestic staff and their employers. Featuring life at Chillingham Castle, Maunsel House, Carlton Towers and Muncaster Castle

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: At Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to Tokyo and checks out the Park Hyatt, the hotel featured in the film Lost in Translation, and goes behind the closed doors of the Japanese capitals love hotels. In the fashionable district of Meguro, Richard takes in the Claska, which was the citys first boutique hotel and has its own canine beauty salon

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the citys biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: King Viserys Targaryen hosts a tournament to celebrate the impending birth of his second child, while his daughter Rhaenyra welcomes her Uncle Daemon back to the Red Keep. First episode of the Game of Thrones prequel, starring Paddy Considine and Matt Smith

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra oversteps at the Small Council, while Viserys is urged to secure the succession through a new marriage and Daemon announces his intentions

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Daemon and the Sea Snake battle the Crabfeeder, while the realm celebrates Aegons second nameday and Rhaenyra faces the prospect of marriage. Paddy Considine and Matt Smith star

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra continues her search for a suitable match, while Daemon returns to Kings Landing and stirs more trouble for the king. Rhaenyra learns a valuable lesson

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Daemon visits his wife in the Vale, while Viserys and Rhaenyra broker agreements with the Velaryons, and Alicent seeks the truth about the princess

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Now a decade older, Rhaenyra navigates continued speculation about her children, while Daemon and Laena consider an offer from Pentos. Paddy Considine and Matt Smith star

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As the families descend on Driftmark for a funeral, King Viserys calls for an end to infighting between members of the Great Houses. Paddy Considine and Matt Smith star

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Six years later, the succession plans for Driftmark become critical, and Rhaenyra tries to strike a bargain with Rhaenys

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: While Alicent enlists help to track down Aegon, members of the Great Houses of Westeros are asked to affirm their allegiance

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: While mourning a tragic loss, Rhaenyra tries desperately to hold the realm together and Daemon prepares for war. Starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: I Hate Suzie
programme.desc: Naomi and Suzie attend visionary director Hal Holloways press night, where they cross paths with Carters glamorous wife, Genevieve

programme.title: I Hate Suzie
programme.desc: Finally coming to terms with her situation, Suzie decides to take control of her life by becoming the narrator of her own story

programme.title: The Fear Index
programme.desc: Alex heads to his therapist, terrified that he may be losing his mind. Then, a new revelation convinces him that he is being framed

programme.title: The Fear Index
programme.desc: As VIXAL-4 exceeds its programming limits, Dr Hoffman races against the clock to stop what he might have inadvertently started. Thriller, starring Josh Hartnett

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Danvers and Prior set out to learn more about Tsalal - and find an unlikely location for the physical evidence - Captain Connelly threatens to hand the case over to Anchorage. Later, Navarro and Danvers separately find a connection between one of the Tsalal men and Annie, prompting the former partners to agree to work the case together

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: As the Waystar team discusses a pivotal recommendation to the board, Roman, Kendall and Shiv navigate a misstep with Matsson. Jeremy Strong, Sarah Snook and Kieran Culkin star

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: The Waystar team heads to Norway to meet Matsson and his staff, while Shiv, Kendall and Roman consider whether to fight for Logans original deal

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming examines the hidden histories of cities, revealing the sights and sounds rarely witnessed by the public. He begins in London at St Pauls Cathedral, where he visits a place tourists never go, before exploring a hidden park and a little-known church. He also gets a guided tour of Soho from broadcaster Danny Baker

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots and their human allies face a confrontation with their original creator, who has brainwashed their leader and intends to save her own home planet by destroying Earth. To save the human race they must recover an ancient artefact from Arthurian legend - but their mission is threatened by old enemies as they uncover a terrible secret about the history of the world. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg, Anthony Hopkins, Gemma Chan, Stanley Tucci and John Turturro

programme.title: The Last Airbender (2010)
programme.desc: A chosen one with mastery of the four elements is charged with keeping the peace between four nations. When he disappears while still a boy, one of these factions sees a chance to gain absolute power and wages war on the others. After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage (2021)
programme.desc: Struggling to cope with his alter ego Venom, Eddie Brock attempts to re-ignite his journalistic career by interviewing serial killer Cletus Kasady. However, Kasady becomes the host of the symbiote Carnage and escapes prison after a failed execution. Comic-book fantasy sequel, directed by Andy Serkis and starring Tom Hardy, Woody Harrelson and Michelle Williams

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance (2024)
programme.desc: Journalist Eddie Brock and symbiote partner-in-crime Venom are lying low in Mexico City, on the run for the apparent murder of detective Patrick Mulligan. The cop and his bonded entity, Toxin, are actually alive at the Imperium symbiote containment programme, beneath the Area 51 US Air Force facility in the Nevada desert. Knull, the symbiotes immortal creator, dispatches hunters to locate Venoms hidden power source, the Codex, which can set Knull free to terrorise the multiverse. Fantasy adventure, starring Tom Hardy, Chiwetel Ejiofor, Stephen Graham and Juno Temple

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Bumblebee (2018)
programme.desc: In 1987, lonely Californian teenager Charlie Watson is traumatised by the death of her father and resentful of her mother Sallys relationship with new boyfriend Ronald. For her 18th-birthday shes given a yellow Volkswagen Beetle, which turns out to be the battle-scarred Autobot Bumblebee. Transformers prequel, starring Hailee Steinfeld, John Cena and Jorge Lendeborg Jr

programme.title: Transformers (2007)
programme.desc: Teenager Sam Witwicky is treated to his first car by his dad, but it turns out to be an alien scout with a life of its own. Before long, the vehicle embroils Sam in a long-running intergalactic war between two factions of giant shape-changing robots, which have come to Earth to find a mystical cube that grants infinite power to its possessor. Michael Bays sci-fi action adventure, inspired by the toy franchise, with Shia LaBeouf, Megan Fox, Josh Duhamel, Jon Voight and John Turturro

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen (2009)
programme.desc: The war between the shape-shifting robots erupts once again, as the first of the evil Decepticons leads an attack on Earth to locate an ancient planet-destroying machine. Hapless teenager Sam Witwicky is caught in the middle of the ensuing conflict as he holds the key to discovering the location of the device. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Shia LaBeouf and Megan Fox

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon (2011)
programme.desc: The heroic autobots discover that a spaceship from their own planet crashed into the moon decades ago, carrying their former leader and an incredibly powerful device. They must fight to defend the human race as their enemies the decepticons plot to use this machine to rebuild their own world and destroy the Earth. Sci-fi adventure sequel, with Shia LaBeouf, Josh Duhamel and Rosie Huntington-Whiteley

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction (2014)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots are driven into hiding when the human race turns against them. When rediscovered by a kindly inventor and his daughter, they come out of exile to save the world, battling a new breed of human-created Transformers. These deadly new machines were created to hunt them down, but are now growing independent and intend to make use of technology from the Transformers home planet in a plot that could threaten all life on Earth. Fourth film in the sci-fi adventure series, starring Mark Wahlberg, Stanley Tucci and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots and their human allies face a confrontation with their original creator, who has brainwashed their leader and intends to save her own home planet by destroying Earth. To save the human race they must recover an ancient artefact from Arthurian legend - but their mission is threatened by old enemies as they uncover a terrible secret about the history of the world. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg, Anthony Hopkins, Gemma Chan, Stanley Tucci and John Turturro

programme.title: Transformers One (2024)
programme.desc: Years before the sentient robots became arch enemies, Optimus Prime and Megatron were friends on their home planet of Cybertron. However, their feud changes the universe forever. Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Chris Hemsworth, Brian Tyree Henry, Scarlett Johansson and Keegan-Michael Key

programme.title: Bumblebee (2018)

Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Chris Hemsworth, Brian Tyree Henry, Scarlett Johansson and Keegan-Michael Key

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie (2025)
programme.desc: Four misfits are yanked through a strange portal into a cubic realm powered by imagination. To return home, they must learn its rules and journey alongside an unlikely master crafter. Director Jared Hesss blockbusting fantasy adventure based on the hit videogame, starring Jack Black, Jason Momoa, Emma Myers and Jennifer Coolidge

programme.title: Uncharted (2022)
programme.desc: A pair of treasure hunters embark on a globetrotting search for a fortune that was lost 500 years previously, in a race against time against a ruthless rival who claims to be the rightful owner. The quest for fortune and glory sets the younger of the duo on a search for his missing brother. Action adventure, starring Tom Holland, Mark Wahlberg and Antonio Banderas

programme.title: Spy Kids (2001)
programme.desc: A megalomaniac threatens to take over the world, so two married spies come out of retirement to thwart his plans. However, when they go missing, it is up to their plucky children to step in and save the day. Family adventure directed by Robert Rodriguez, starring Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alan Cumming, Alexa Vega and Daryl Sabara

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: Island of Lost Dreams (2002)
programme.desc: The pint-sized secret agents investigate a mad scientist who has meddled with powerful forces and created a host of bizarre mutant animals. However, the villain is not the only problem they have to face, as another pair of youngsters are determined to outshine them. Family adventure sequel, starring Antonio Banderas, Steve Buscemi and Carla Gugino

programme.title: Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over (2003)
programme.desc: Young agent Juni has to go it alone when his big sister Carmen is kidnapped by the evil Toymaker, forcing the plucky junior spy to infiltrate the villains virtual reality world to rescue her. Adventure sequel, starring Daryl Sabara, Alexa Vega, Sylvester Stallone, Antonio Banderas, Ricardo Montalban, George Clooney, Steve Buscemi, Salma Hayek and Elijah Wood

programme.title: Nobody 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday, but soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a bloodthirsty crime boss. Comedy thriller, starring Bob Odenkirk, Connie Nielsen and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: Man Finds Tape (2025)
programme.desc: After finding mysterious video clips, siblings investigate the strange recordings and uncover a disturbing secret. Horror thriller, starring Kelsey Pribilski and William Magnuson

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons Oscar-winning action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, an Academy Award-winning Sean Penn, and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: Man Finds Tape (2025)
programme.desc: After finding mysterious video clips, siblings investigate the strange recordings and uncover a disturbing secret. Horror thriller, starring Kelsey Pribilski and William Magnuson

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Hostages (2025)
programme.desc: After an explosion at a London hotel, three people are swept up in the chaos. As rumours circulate that the blast was a terrorist attack, their story gathers momentum on social media and across the rolling 24-hour news cycle. Writer/director Jim Owens comedy thriller, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Tanya Moodie and Nicholas Asbury

programme.desc: A look at Sam Allardyces iconic Bolton team of the early 2000s in the Premier League

programme.desc: A look at the life and times of the football player-turned-manager, who died in November 2023, intertwined with the story of Englands unforgettable run at Euro 96, with insight from players, friends and family

programme.title: QPR: The Four Year Plan
programme.desc: An insight into the running of Queens Park Rangers football club, as cameras were given unprecedented access to the boardroom and the first team. In 2007, the club was facing relegation from the Championship as well as financial ruin, before being bought by F1 supremo Bernie Ecclestone and Italian businessman Flavio Briatore. Soon after, they were joined on the board by Indian steel magnate Lakshmi Mittal, and together the new owners promised a return to glory for the club and its supporters

programme.title: Adam Hills: Foot Fault
programme.desc: The comedian and host of The Last Leg takes viewers behind the scenes of a global campaign to promote para-standing tennis and its potential as a future Grand Slam and Paralympic event. Adam meets and plays with former Grand Slam winners and uncovers the barriers faced by aspiring tennis players with disabilities who want to be included by their sport at the highest level

programme.desc: Documentary about the search to find a rare whale that calls out at a frequency unrecognised by other whales. This mysterious creature is believed to have lived its life in complete solitude, pointing to a greater awareness of human loneliness than ever before

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: The former England netball captain discusses the individuals that have inspired her during her life and career

programme.title: Williams and Mansell: Red 5

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: The former sprint superstar and Olympic gold medalist discusses the individuals that have inspired him in his life and career

programme.title: Busby (2019)
programme.desc: A profile of former Manchester United manager Matt Busby, who transformed football through a career of great talent and tragedy. Featuring previously unseen archive footage and interviews with those who knew the man best

programme.title: Germanwings: What Happened on Flight 9525?
programme.desc: The circumstances surrounding the crash of an Airbus A320-211 in 2015, which killed 150 people and was found to have been deliberately caused by the co-pilot

programme.title: Bowling for Columbine (2002)
programme.desc: Michael Moores Oscar-winning documentary exploring Americas love affair with firearms. Going beyond public opinion, the film-maker examines corporate and political influence, visiting a bank where weapons are given to customers, as well as talking to Charlton Heston, one of the most famous proponents of every Americans right to bear arms

programme.title: Dave Not Coming Back (2020)
programme.desc: The story of two divers who embarked on a long and dangerous mission to retrieve a dead body from a freshwater cave in South Africa, with devastating consequences

programme.title: Forced Out (2023)
programme.desc: The stories of men and women dishonourably discharged from the Army, Navy and RAF because of their sexuality, with many imprisoned, having medals removed or losing their service pensions

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts investigate strange carvings from 8,000 BC and unexplained sightings in the New World, which could suggest there is more to the USs past than written in the history books

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Alien encounters have offered a possible glimpse into the secrets of interstellar navigation. Giorgio Tsoukalos contemplates whether this might one day ensure mankinds survival

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Giorgio Tsoukalos reveals how advances in technology have given unprecedented access to distant galaxies that may harbour life. However, alien life may be found closer to home

programme.title: Weird Britain
programme.desc: Andy McGrath returns to Cornwall, searching for legends. He meets a real-life mermaid, stalks a local churchyard for owl men and faeries, and stops off at a haunted smugglers inn to learn about its ghostly residents

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits archaeological digs around the country to learn more about mankinds Stone Age ancestors, and travels to Jersey to meet a team hoping to shed new light on the Neanderthals. In the Preseli Hills in Pembrokeshire, she learns about an investigation into the mystery surrounding Stonehenge, and hears stories of cannibalism and the ritual use of human skulls during the Ice Age

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: A further look at some of the worlds most strange unexplained phenomena, featuring the mystery surrounding the Myrtles Plantation in Louisiana, which boasts stories of unsolved murder, vengeful ghosts, and things that go bump in the night

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: A look at some of the worlds most strange unexplained phenomena. Since the 1950s, multiple air disasters have had one thing in common - flight number 191. Is it a coincidence, or something more sinister?

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: New painter Neil takes a perfectionist approach to re-painting Connors 66 Chevelle Malibu. Mike worries that his car collection wont sell for much. Dubs Kustoms scores a new client who wants to recreate a hundred-year-old Essex Boattail Roadster

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: A further look at some of the worlds most strange unexplained phenomena. This second episode looks at the mysterious disappearance of US union official Jimmy Hoffa in July 1975. He was declared dead seven years later

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts spends a year visiting archaeological digs around the country, finding out about discoveries that shed new light on British history. In a Roman-themed first edition, she examines the mystery surrounding the skeletons of 97 babies found beside the Thames, a newly discovered town in rural Devon and a cult figure buried for 1,700 years beneath a fort

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits archaeological digs around the country to discover what life was like during the Bronze and Iron ages before the Romans invaded. In Norfolk, she helps to uncover a prehistoric monument that has been hidden for 2,000 years, and examines the Hebridean skeletons known as the Cladh Hallan Mummies, learning each is made up of parts from different people

programme.title: Weird Britain
programme.desc: Andy McGrath embarks on a mission to unearth the Cornish sites of King Arthur and tries magnet fishing for the mythical sword Excalibur. Plus, a renowned psychic investigates a haunted jail and possessed house

programme.title: Weird Britain
programme.desc: Andy McGrath returns to Cornwall, searching for legends. He meets a real-life mermaid, stalks a local churchyard for owl men and faeries, and stops off at a haunted smugglers inn to learn about its ghostly residents

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: Amid the chaos of D-Day, alarming wireless messages revealed Special Operations Executive (SOE) disloyalty. While concerns escalated, Allied troops advanced and Paris was liberated. SOE operations subsequently dwindled, prompting Second World War spymistress Vera Atkins to confront the harm done to her agents

programme.title: The Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.sub-title: The Quest for the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Various traditions describe the Holy Grail as a cup, dish, or stone with miraculous powers capbale of providing eternal youth or sustenance in infinite abundance. As the Third Reich rose to power, Himmler and the SS became fixated on the Grail, interpreting much of the myth surrounding it as fact - and the quest for it as attainable

programme.title: WWIIs Most Daring Raids
programme.desc: In July 1943 the Allied Forces had evicted the Axis powers from North Africa and could finally begin the Italian Campaign. The first mission was Operation Husky, a massive amphibious invasion of the island of Sicily

programme.title: Clash of the Gods
programme.desc: Documentary profiling Hades, the god of the underworld. Plus, a look at Greek mythologys understanding of the afterlife

programme.title: Clash of the Gods
programme.desc: The story of Zeus, the king of the Greek gods, and how he led the Olympians to defeat the Titans and gain control of the universe

programme.title: Apocalypse D-Day
programme.desc: Part one of two. The story of the key turning point of the Second World War, which started on June 6, 1944. A titanic fleet took on the beaches of Normandy, intent on liberating Europe from Hitlers Nazis. Thanks to the lessons learned from the Dieppe raid of August 1942 and supported by the Provence landing of August 1944, the mission was a spectacular success as the Allies succeeded in moving beyond their political differences, overcoming logistical difficulties and carrying out an operation with unprecedented military stakes

programme.title: WWII Battles in Colour
programme.desc: The Battle of the Bulge, a major German offensive campaign on the Western Front during the Second World War, which took place in December 1944 and January 1945. programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel is given another opportunity to take a far from typical custom job to its absolute limit

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: North - Viking Boat and Tudor Feasts
programme.desc: Alice Roberts and Matt Williams explore finds from archaeological digs across the north of Britain, and begin at the Ness of Brodgar in the Heart of Neolithic Orkney World Heritage Site, where they view a 5,000-year-old temple. programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Witches of Essex
programme.desc: Henry VIIIs law against witches in 1542 led to thousands of women being persecuted and many burned at the stake. New investigative techniques and historical records are to re-examine the fates of women accused of witchcraft during 16th and 17th-century witch trials in Essex. Rylan and Alice Roberts explores the events, lives, and alleged crimes of those accused, often bringing the stories to life through scripted drama and featuring expert testimony from historians and psychologists

programme.title: Witches of Essex
programme.desc: St Osyth, a village near Brightlingsea in Essex, was home to 14 women who were put on trial for witchcraft, some of whom were duly convicted according to the law of the time. Rylan and Alice Roberts investigate the 1582 St Osyth witch hunt, where a petty disagreement over money spiralled into mass hysteria and death

programme.title: Witches of Essex
programme.desc: Rylan and Alice Roberts visit Manningtree, the focal point for the 1645 witch hunt where self-appointed Witchfinder General Matthew Hopkins orchestrated the persecution of many women accused of witchcraft. He terrorised those accused with brutal Puritan zeal and torture

programme.title: Britains X Files
programme.desc: Investigative journalist Tim Tate combs through previously top-secret government files which disclose the details of extensive military, spy agency and police investigations into the paranormal

programme.title: Great British Castle Rescue
programme.desc: Rick Edwards arrives at Lowther Castle, which was gutted by the 7th Earl of Lonsdale. Now, Jim Lowther, the 7th Earls son, is trying to save it

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Liners
programme.desc: The SS Cap Arcona, launched in 1927, was a large German ocean liner, later a ship of the German Navy, and finally a prison ship. During the Second World War it became the target of an RAF squadron attack

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Liners
programme.desc: SS America was an ocean liner and cruise ship built in the US in 1940 for the United States Lines, designed by the noted naval architect William Francis Gibbs. She served her owners for 55 years until she was unceremoniously left abandoned in the Canary Islands

programme.title: Hitlers Secret Sex Life

programme.desc: In the first of a two-part documentary, the naturalist explores the origins of life on Earth. Beginning the journey near his childhood home in Charnwood Forest, Leicestershire, he learns how a fossil discovery transformed scientists understanding of the evolution of complex organisms, and in Newfoundland and Australia he reveals the earliest kinds of animal to exist on the planet. With the help of cutting-edge technology and visual effects, the programme brings the creatures to life, demonstrating how they survived

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: In the conclusion of the two-part documentary, the naturalist travels to Burgess Shale in Canadas Rocky Mountains, where he explores how evolution gained pace once creatures developed mouths and mobility. In Scotland, he reveals that one of the smallest fossils found holds the secret to how animals began surviving on dry land, and explains the bloom of life during the oxygen-rich Carboniferous period

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part documentary, the naturalist explores the origins of life on Earth. Beginning the journey near his childhood home in Charnwood Forest, Leicestershire, he learns how a fossil discovery transformed scientists understanding of the evolution of complex organisms, and in Newfoundland and Australia he reveals the earliest kinds of animal to exist on the planet. With the help of cutting-edge technology and visual effects, the programme brings the creatures to life, demonstrating how they survived

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: In the conclusion of the two-part documentary, the naturalist travels to Burgess Shale in Canadas Rocky Mountains, where he explores how evolution gained pace once creatures developed mouths and mobility. In Scotland, he reveals that one of the smallest fossils found holds the secret to how animals began surviving on dry land, and explains the bloom of life during the oxygen-rich Carboniferous period

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A further selection of creepy-crawly close-ups, focusing on courtship in the bug world. Highlights include scorpions shaking their booty, the perfume-wearing nasonia wasp and the tropical cricket, for whom romance goes out of the window as it uses bribery to seal the deal with would-be partners. One potential partner to steer well clear of, however, is the praying mantis, the female of which is notorious for eating the male just after - or even during - mating. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Pride Rules
programme.desc: The challenges that lions face during the rainy season, when everything turns green and spoils the big cats camouflage

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: Tom Hardy presents a journey to the harsh Okavango Delta as the Matata pride do battle with wildfires and flooding in a high-stakes fight to keep their cubs alive

programme.title: Wild Latin America
programme.desc: A newborn whale draws its first breath and then preparation begins for one of the longest migrations on the planet

programme.title: Wild Latin America
programme.desc: Tensions rise as breeding season nears for the squirrel monkeys. With enemies closing in, dominant female Alba must find her alpha male suitor

programme.title: Beasts of the Big Blue
programme.desc: Exploring New Zealands marine wildlife, beginning with Snares Island in the southern Pacific and its crested penguins, petrels and sea lions

programme.title: Blithe Spirit (2020)
programme.desc: A spiritualist medium holds a seance for a writer suffering from writers block, but accidentally summons the spirit of his deceased first wife. That leads to an increasingly complex love triangle with his current spouse of five years. Director Edward Halls take on the Noel Coward comedy, starring Isla Fisher, Dan Stevens and Leslie Mann

programme.title: Funny Cow (2018)
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian fights for success on the brutally unforgiving working mens club scene of 1970s northern England. Drama, starring Maxine Peake, Stephen Graham, Paddy Considine and Tony Pitts, who also wrote the screenplay

programme.title: Adult Life Skills (2016)
programme.desc: A woman returns to her home town to live in a shed belonging to her mother, who grows frustrated as her daughter regresses to childhood. A friendship develops between the directionless woman and a troubled young boy, which gives her the push she needs to develop a more independent outlook on life. Comedy, starring Jodie Whittaker and Lorraine Ashbourne

programme.title: Finding Your Feet (2017)
programme.desc: A wealthy womans privileged existence is shattered when she discovers her husband is having an affair with her best friend. Seeking solace, she turns to her estranged sister, who lives in a London council estate, and finds a new lease of life in joining her community dance class. Comedy, starring Imelda Staunton, Celia Imrie, Timothy Spall and Joanna Lumley

programme.title: Ride On (2023)
programme.desc: Lao Luo is a washed-up stuntman with a deformed horse called Red Hare, who he saved from euthanasia. The duo become overnight sensations when a fight with debt collectors goes viral. Writer/director Larry Yangs action drama, starring Jackie Chan, Liu Haocun and Kevin Guo. In Mandarin, with subtitles

programme.title: Men in Black (1997)
programme.desc: A streetwise cop is enlisted by a top-secret government force dedicated to policing alien visitors to Earth, teaming up with a veteran agent just as a body-swapping extraterrestrial giant insect begins a reign of terror throughout New York City. Sci-fi comedy, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Linda Fiorentino, Rip Torn and Vincent DOnofrio

programme.title: Men in Black II (2002)
programme.desc: Agent J investigates the unauthorised landing of a spacecraft and discovers a malevolent alien disguised as a lingerie model is on the verge of destroying humanity. His only hope of stopping her diabolical plot is to restore the memory of his retired partner K - but his former mentor takes more than a little convincing. Sci-fi comedy sequel, directed by Barry Sonnenfeld, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Rosario Dawson, Lara Flynn Boyle, Johnny Knoxville, Rip Torn and Tony Shalhoub

programme.title: Men in Black 3 (2012)
programme.desc: An alien criminal escapes from a prison on the moon and goes back in time on a mission of revenge, changing the course of history. Agent J of the top-secret Earth defence organisation follows him back to 1969, and joins forces with a younger version of his mentor Agent K to set things right. Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Will Smith, Josh Brolin and Tommy Lee Jones

programme.title: Were the Millers (2013)
programme.desc: A drug dealer is hired to pick up a shipment of marijuana in Mexico and bring it back over the border. To make himself look less suspicious, he recruits a stripper and two teenagers to pose as a perfect all-American family on holiday, only to end up getting on the wrong side of a drug cartel. Comedy, with Jason Sudeikis, Jennifer Aniston and Emma Roberts

programme.title: Mean Girls (2004)
programme.desc: A teenager is surprised when she is befriended by the girls in the most popular clique at her new school. However, a dating mishap leads to trouble and her supposed friends start to turn on her. Urged on by other pals outside their circle, the newcomer resolves to bring down the self-appointed queen of campus - only to end up adopting some of her rivals crueller characteristics. Comedy, with Lindsay Lohan, Rachel McAdams, Tina Fey and Lacey Chabert

programme.title: The 40 Year-Old Virgin (2005)
programme.desc: A middle-aged shop worker reveals he has never been intimate with a woman, which prompts his shocked colleagues to set him up with a series of potentially passionate dates. When he falls for a single mother, his friends think he is right on course for a lusty liaison, but his new partner is not ready for a physical relationship. Judd Apatows comedy, starring Steve Carell, Catherine Keener and Paul Rudd

programme.title: Role Models (2008)
programme.desc: Two irresponsible salesmen find themselves in trouble with the law after crashing their truck. To avoid jail, they agree to undertake community service looking after a couple of troubled kids. However, it soon seems that going to prison would have been the easier option. Comedy, starring Paul Rudd, Seann William Scott and Christopher Mintz-Plasse

However, they have promised to supply the booze for the event, a task that proves much harder than expected because they are under age. Unfortunately, when a friend steps in to help, the situation gets even worse. Comedy, starring Jonah Hill, Michael Cera and Christopher Mintz-Plasse

programme.desc: A poet has a history of ruining relationships owing to his paranoia, but when he meets the woman of his dreams, he resolves to make this romance last. However, as their wedding day approaches, he becomes convinced she is a notorious serial killer the police are hunting for. Comedy, starring Mike Myers and Nancy Travis

Comedy sequel, with Ben Stiller, Robert De Niro, Owen Wilson and Dustin Hoffman

programme.desc: Three men on a stag weekend in Las Vegas wake up after a night of heavy drinking and find they have not only misplaced the groom, but somehow gained a tiger and a baby. Comedy, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: De Valera San Fhásach
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary about American-born Irish statesman and political leader Éamon de Valera, a leader in the 1916 Easter Rising. In 1924, De Valera was stripped of power and in poor mental health in prison. There was a cohort of radical women involved in the 1916 Rising and the War of Independence who supported him. Then the Treaty happened. As suddenly as he had gained power, de Valera was locked out of it. Opposing the Treaty gave these women common ground with De Valera, but who would end up the losers in this political game?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

However, the panel includes Mrs Davis from Human Resources, whom Sheldon has crossed paths with before. Guest starring Regina King

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his desire for closure when one of his favourite TV shows is cancelled on a cliffhanger ending. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
